cases.title: Comic / Storyboard - Cyberpunk Ronin Duel

titles.en: Comic / Storyboard - Cyberpunk Ronin Duel
titles.zh: 漫画 / 故事板 - 赛博朋克浪人对决

cases.promptPreview: Create a cinematic cyberpunk anime action scene in a rainy neon-lit alley at night. Two main fighters face off in the center: on the left, a mysterious ronin wearing a wide straw kasa hat and a long torn black cloak, seen mostly from behind in a low battle stance, holding a katana; on the right, an armored ninja-samur...

prompts.en: Create a cinematic cyberpunk anime action scene in a rainy neon-lit alley at night. Two main fighters face off in the center: on the left, a mysterious ronin wearing a wide straw kasa hat and a long torn black cloak, seen mostly from behind in a low battle stance, holding a katana; on the right, an armored ninja-samurai with a demonic oni-style mask and glowing red eyes lunges forward with two blades, one extended outward and one crossing the clash. Their swords meet at the center in a brilliant cyan-white energy burst, throwing sharp electric sparks and turquoise lightning arcs across the wet street. The setting is a dense futuristic Japanese city alley with reflective cobblestone pavement, heavy rain, puddles, mist, exposed pipes, hanging cables, umbrellas in the background, and many vertical neon signs with Japanese/Chinese-style characters in pink, cyan, blue, orange, and purple. Use a dynamic wide 16:9 composition, dramatic perspective, high contrast rim lighting, motion streaks, rain splashes around the fighters’ feet, detailed armor and cloth folds, glowing reflections on the ground, dark blue atmospheric shadows, and polished high-end anime concept art quality. Keep exactly two combatants, no readable English text, no logos, no watermark.
prompts.zh: 创作一个电影感的赛博朋克动漫动作场景，背景是夜晚霓虹闪烁的雨中巷道。两名主要战士在中央对峙：左侧是一位神秘的浪人，头戴宽大的草笠，身披破旧的长款黑斗篷，主要以背影呈现，摆出低姿态的战斗架势，手持武士刀；右侧是一位身穿盔甲的忍者武士，戴着恶魔般的鬼面具，双眼闪烁红光，正向前突刺，双刀一柄向外延伸，另一柄横跨碰撞。他们的刀剑在中心相交，迸发出耀眼的青白色能量，在潮湿的街道上溅射出锐利的电火花和青绿色闪电弧。场景设定在密集的未来主义日本城市巷道中，地面是反光的鹅卵石路面，伴有大雨、水坑、薄雾、裸露的管道、悬挂的电缆、背景中的雨伞，以及许多带有日文/中文风格字符的粉色、青色、蓝色、橙色和紫色垂直霓虹灯牌。采用 16:9 动态宽屏构图，戏剧性的透视效果，高对比度的轮廓光，运动轨迹，战士脚边溅起的水花，细腻的盔甲与衣物褶皱，地面上的发光倒影，深蓝色的氛围阴影，以及精致的高端动漫概念艺术质量。保持画面中仅有两名战斗人员，不要出现可读的英文字符，不要有 Logo，不要有水印。

descriptions.en: A cinematic anime prompt for generating a rainy neon cyberpunk samurai duel with dramatic sword-clash energy.
descriptions.zh: 一个用于生成雨夜霓虹赛博朋克武士对决场景的电影感动漫提示词，充满戏剧性的刀剑碰撞能量。

cases.author: Abe Lee

cases.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - Longjing Tea Infographic Poster

titles.en: Infographic / Edu Visual - Longjing Tea Infographic Poster
titles.zh: 信息图 / 教育视觉图 - 龙井茶信息图海报

cases.promptPreview: Goal: Create a clean premium Chinese tea infographic poster about {argument name="tea name" default="龙井茶"}, with an elegant editorial layout, soft natural lighting, and a refined off-white and sage-green palette. Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 composition, approximately 1200×675 px, with a warm ivory background and roun...

prompts.en:
Goal: Create a clean premium Chinese tea infographic poster about {argument name="tea name" default="龙井茶"}, with an elegant editorial layout, soft natural lighting, and a refined off-white and sage-green palette.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 composition, approximately 1200×675 px, with a warm ivory background and rounded-card UI layout. Use subtle shadows, thin dividers, pale green botanical accents, and minimalist line icons. Overall style should feel like a polished lifestyle magazine infographic for a famous Chinese tea.

Layout: Use exactly 8 rounded rectangular content cards plus 1 long bottom slogan banner. Arrange them in a neat grid. Left side contains one large hero card occupying about half the width and most of the height. Right side contains four smaller information cards in a 2×2 grid. Bottom left contains one small card. Bottom center/right contains one long horizontal slogan banner. Keep generous spacing and consistent rounded corners.

Main hero card: Show a softly lit tabletop scene with a clear glass cup of pale yellow-green tea in the upper right, visible floating Longjing tea leaves, and a small white porcelain dish piled with flat green tea leaves in the lower center. Add blurred green plant shadows in the background. Text on the left: small pill label with a leaf icon and {argument name="category label" default="中国十大名茶之一"}; large dark-green Chinese title {argument name="tea name" default="龙井茶"}; smaller English subtitle “Longjing Tea”; short description in Chinese: “中国十大名茶之一，以扁平挺秀、清香鲜爽著称。” At the bottom of this hero card, include exactly 3 feature icon blocks: 1) leaf icon, label “历史悠久”, sublabel “千年传承”; 2) mountain icon, label “匠心工艺”, sublabel “传统炒制”; 3) teacup icon, label “清雅之味”, sublabel “自然本真”. Add a small location pill at the lower right with a pin icon and text “浙江·杭州·西湖”.

Right information cards: Create exactly 4 cards. Card 1, top middle: “产地” with a small pagoda/temple line icon in a circle, text “主要产于浙江杭州西湖一带，西湖龙井最为知名。” and faint misty mountain scenery along the bottom. Card 2, top right: “特点” with a dark green circular leaf icon and exactly 4 listed rows separated by dotted lines: “外形扁平挺直”, “色泽嫩绿光润”, “香气清高鲜爽”, “滋味鲜醇甘润”, each with a small matching line icon. Card 3, lower middle: “风味” with a teacup icon, text “豆香、栗香与清新的嫩香并存，口感柔和，回甘细腻。” and a pale botanical leaf illustration in the lower right. Card 4, lower right: “冲泡建议” with a teapot icon, text “水温 80–85°C | 茶水比例 1:50 | 可用玻璃杯或盖碗冲泡。” At the bottom of this card include exactly 3 small brewing icons and labels: thermometer “80–85°C”, water drop “1:50”, teacup “玻璃杯/盖碗”.

Bottom left card: “等级与采摘” with a leaf icon badge, text “以春茶为佳，芽叶细嫩，明前茶尤受欢迎。” and one rectangular photo inset on the right showing fresh bright green tea shoots growing outdoors with shallow depth of field.

Bottom slogan banner: A long pale green banner with subtle tea-leaf texture. Center the large dark-green Chinese slogan {argument name="slogan text" default="鲜 · 香 · 甘"}. On the right add smaller text “一杯龙井，品味江南春意”, a delicate flowing line drawing of tea leaves, and a tiny vertical square seal containing “茶”.

Visual style: Premium minimal Chinese design, soft natural photography mixed with clean vector icons, warm ivory cards, sage green accents, dark forest-green typography, thin elegant Chinese serif-style font for headings, smaller gray-green body text, balanced whitespace, subtle paper texture, no clutter.

Constraints: Use exactly the card count and item counts described above. Keep all Chinese text crisp and legible. Do not add extra sections, extra icons, watermarks, logos, people, or unrelated decorative objects.
prompts.zh:
目标：创作一张简洁且高端的中国茶信息图海报，主题为 {argument name="tea name" default="龙井茶"}，采用优雅的编辑排版、柔和的自然光影以及精致的米白色与鼠尾草绿配色。

画布：宽屏 16:9 构图，约 1200×675 像素，背景为暖象牙色，采用圆角卡片 UI 布局。使用细腻的阴影、纤细的分隔线、淡绿色植物装饰及极简线条图标。整体风格应呈现出知名中国茶的高级生活方式杂志信息图质感。

布局：使用 8 张圆角矩形内容卡片加 1 个底部长条标语横幅。将它们排列成整齐的网格。左侧包含一张占据约一半宽度和大部分高度的大型主视觉卡片。右侧包含 4 张较小的信息卡片，呈 2×2 网格排列。左下角包含 1 张小卡片。底部中央/右侧包含 1 个长横向标语横幅。保持充足的留白和统一的圆角。

主视觉卡片：展示一个光影柔和的桌面场景，右上角是一杯清澈的淡黄绿色茶汤，可见漂浮的龙井茶叶，正下方是一个盛放着扁平绿茶的白色瓷碟。背景添加模糊的绿色植物阴影。左侧文字：带有叶子图标的小标签 {argument name="category label" default="中国十大名茶之一"}；深绿色大号中文标题 {argument name="tea name" default="龙井茶"}；较小的英文副标题“Longjing Tea”；中文简短描述：“中国十大名茶之一，以扁平挺秀、清香鲜爽著称。” 在该卡片底部，包含 3 个特征图标块：1) 叶子图标，标签“历史悠久”，副标签“千年传承”；2) 山峰图标，标签“匠心工艺”，副标签“传统炒制”；3) 茶杯图标，标签“清雅之味”，副标签“自然本真”。右下角添加一个带有定位图标的小标签，文字为“浙江·杭州·西湖”。

右侧信息卡片：创建 4 张卡片。卡片 1（中上）：标题“产地”，配有圆形宝塔/寺庙线条图标，文字“主要产于浙江杭州西湖一带，西湖龙井最为知名。”，底部带有淡淡的云雾山景。卡片 2（右上）：标题“特点”，配有深绿色圆形叶子图标，并列出 4 行由虚线分隔的文字：“外形扁平挺直”、“色泽嫩绿光润”、“香气清高鲜爽”、“滋味鲜醇甘润”，每行配有对应的小线条图标。卡片 3（中下）：标题“风味”，配有茶杯图标，文字“豆香、栗香与清新的嫩香并存，口感柔和，回甘细腻。”，右下角配有淡雅的植物叶片插画。卡片 4（右下）：标题“冲泡建议”，配有茶壶图标，文字“水温 80–85°C | 茶水比例 1:50 | 可用玻璃杯或盖碗冲泡。” 在该卡片底部包含 3 个小型冲泡图标及标签：温度计“80–85°C”、水滴“1:50”、茶杯“玻璃杯/盖碗”。

左下角卡片：标题“等级与采摘”，配有叶子图标徽章，文字“以春茶为佳，芽叶细嫩，明前茶尤受欢迎。”，右侧嵌入一张矩形照片，展示户外鲜嫩翠绿的茶芽，具有浅景深效果。

底部标语横幅：一条带有细腻茶叶纹理的浅绿色长横幅。居中放置深绿色大号中文标语 {argument name="slogan text" default="鲜 · 香 · 甘"}。右侧添加较小文字“一杯龙井，品味江南春意”、精致的茶叶线条画以及一个包含“茶”字的微型垂直方形印章。

视觉风格：高端极简中国风设计，柔和的自然摄影与简洁的矢量图标结合，暖象牙色卡片，鼠尾草绿点缀，深森林绿字体，标题采用纤细优雅的中文宋体，正文使用较小的灰绿色字体，均衡的留白，细腻的纸张纹理，无杂乱元素。

约束：严格遵守上述卡片数量和项目数量。保持所有中文字符清晰易读。不要添加额外的部分、图标、水印、Logo、人物或无关的装饰物。

descriptions.en: A refined Chinese tea infographic layout showcasing Longjing tea origin, flavor, features, brewing advice, and premium product photography.
descriptions.zh: 一款精致的中国茶信息图布局，展示了龙井茶的产地、风味、特点、冲泡建议及高端产品摄影。

cases.author: AbleGPT

cases.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - Vintage Rabbit Collage Specimen

titles.en: Infographic / Edu Visual - Vintage Rabbit Collage Specimen
titles.zh: 信息图 / 教育视觉图 - 复古兔子拼贴标本

cases.promptPreview: Create a vertical vintage mixed-media collage illustration of a standing rabbit-shaped character centered on an aged cream archival paper page, with a thin rectangular border and subtle stains. The character is a full-body anthropomorphic bunny silhouette with exactly 2 long upright ears, 1 round head, 1 torso, 2 arms...

prompts.en: Create a vertical vintage mixed-media collage illustration of a standing rabbit-shaped character centered on an aged cream archival paper page, with a thin rectangular border and subtle stains. The character is a full-body anthropomorphic bunny silhouette with exactly 2 long upright ears, 1 round head, 1 torso, 2 arms, 2 legs, and 2 chunky boots, constructed entirely from torn paper fragments, antique diagrams, maps, manuscript scraps, circuit board pieces, coins, gears, and engineering blueprints. Use a muted sepia, parchment, ochre, navy blueprint, faded green circuit-board, copper, and dark ink palette. The head should be a collage of horse cave-art paper on the left, anatomical/technical drawing paper on the right, a central cream circular face patch containing a simple black infinity symbol, and a large red glass camera-lens or mechanical optical device attached on the right side of the head. Behind the head, draw fine radial sunburst ink lines extending outward. The 2 ears should differ: the left ear contains a scientific network diagram with small labeled nodes and torn manuscript edges; the right ear contains the word “MYCELIUM,” a white mushroom/mycelium illustration, and a green circuit-board strip. The torso should resemble a patched yellow paper coat or tunic with the large printed word {argument name="torso text" default="KANA"}, torn tape-like strips, map fragments, small lightbulb drawings, and exposed green circuit board on the right side. Add exactly 6 visible coins clustered near the lower left side of the head/upper torso, and exactly 3 industrial gears at the character’s left hip/side. The legs and boots should be made from dark navy blueprint paper with white drafting lines, beige torn paper bands, and heavy black boot soles. Include small handwritten annotation labels around the character with thin leader lines, in the style of an old specimen plate: “Catalog ocean prominent” near the upper right, “Illimeted manuscip cuttings” at left middle, “Circuit letterpress samples” at right middle, “Industrial gears” at lower left, and “Catalog specimen plate” at lower right. Overall mood: whimsical retro-futurist cabinet-of-curiosities specimen, precise collage edges, layered torn paper texture, hand-drawn technical details, no photorealistic human features, no modern clean vector style. The main subject should be {argument name="character shape" default="a rabbit silhouette"} with {argument name="central symbol" default="a black infinity symbol"} on the face patch, rendered as a high-resolution scanned paper collage on {argument name="background paper" default="aged cream paper"}.
prompts.zh: 创作一张竖构图的复古混合媒介拼贴插画，画面中心为一个站立的兔子形状角色，背景为泛黄的奶油色档案纸，带有细长矩形边框和淡淡的污渍。该角色是一个全身拟人化的兔子剪影，拥有 2 只修长的竖耳、1 个圆头、1 个躯干、2 只手臂、2 条腿和 2 只厚实的靴子，完全由撕碎的纸片、古董图表、地图、手稿残片、电路板碎片、硬币、齿轮和工程蓝图拼贴而成。配色采用柔和的深褐色、羊皮纸色、赭石色、海军蓝蓝图色、褪色的电路板绿色、铜色和深色墨水色调。头部由左侧的马匹洞穴壁画纸和右侧的解剖/技术绘图纸拼贴而成，中央的奶油色圆形面部贴片上绘有一个简单的黑色无穷大符号，头部右侧附有一个巨大的红色玻璃相机镜头或机械光学装置。在头部后方，绘制向外延伸的精细放射状墨水线条。两只耳朵各不相同：左耳包含一个带有小型标注节点和撕裂手稿边缘的科学网络图；右耳包含单词“MYCELIUM”、白色蘑菇/菌丝体插图以及一条绿色电路板条。躯干看起来像一件打补丁的黄色纸质外套或束腰外衣，上面印有大字 {argument name="torso text" default="KANA"}，并配有撕裂的胶带状纸条、地图碎片、小型灯泡绘图以及右侧露出的绿色电路板。在头部左下方/躯干上部附近添加 6 枚清晰可见的硬币，并在角色左侧髋部/侧面添加 3 个工业齿轮。腿部和靴子由深海军蓝蓝图纸制成，带有白色绘图线条、米色撕裂纸带和厚重的黑色靴底。在角色周围添加带有细引线的小型手写注释标签，呈现老式标本图的风格：右上角标注“Catalog ocean prominent”，左中部标注“Illimeted manuscip cuttings”，右中部标注“Circuit letterpress samples”，左下角标注“Industrial gears”，右下角标注“Catalog specimen plate”。整体氛围：异想天开的复古未来主义珍奇屋标本，精准的拼贴边缘，层叠的撕裂纸张质感，手绘技术细节，无写实人脸特征，非现代简洁矢量风格。主体应为 {argument name="character shape" default="a rabbit silhouette"}，面部贴片上带有 {argument name="central symbol" default="a black infinity symbol"}，以高分辨率扫描纸艺拼贴形式呈现于 {argument name="background paper" default="aged cream paper"} 之上。

descriptions.en: A detailed prompt for generating a retro-futurist rabbit-shaped paper collage specimen plate with diagrams, circuits, coins, gears, and handwritten annotations.
descriptions.zh: 一份详细的提示词，用于生成复古未来主义风格的兔子形状纸艺拼贴标本图，包含图表、电路、硬币、齿轮和手写注释。

cases.author: KANA｜東京AI映像

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Vintage Bar Lace Dress Portrait

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Vintage Bar Lace Dress Portrait
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 复古酒吧蕾丝裙肖像

cases.promptPreview: Create a realistic, high-detail editorial portrait of an adult woman seated at a small round marble café table in an intimate vintage bar or private club. She has {argument name="hair color" default="black"} shoulder-length voluminous wavy bob hair, a poised feminine expression, and warm medium skin. She is wearing an...

prompts.en: Create a realistic, high-detail editorial portrait of an adult woman seated at a small round marble café table in an intimate vintage bar or private club. She has {argument name="hair color" default="black"} shoulder-length voluminous wavy bob hair, a poised feminine expression, and warm medium skin. She is wearing an elegant deep {argument name="dress color" default="burgundy red"} lace evening dress with sheer long lace sleeves, a scalloped neckline, and a fitted bodice, styled as glamorous nightlife fashion rather than explicit nudity. Her left hand holds a stemmed glass of red wine near the table, with a simple gold ring visible on one finger. The setting is richly atmospheric: dark green walls covered with many framed sepia sketches and portraits, polished dark wood trim, leather seating, antique mirrors and glass cabinets, warm amber lamp light, and a moody upscale old-world interior. Compose the image as a medium close-up portrait from slightly above table height, centered on the woman from head to waist, with the wine glass in the lower left foreground and the background softly detailed. Use cinematic warm lighting, natural skin texture, realistic fabric lace detail, shallow depth of field, 35mm documentary photography feel, subtle film grain, and rich contrast. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands, no exaggerated anatomy.
prompts.zh: 创作一张写实且高细节的编辑风格肖像，描绘一位成年女性坐在私密复古酒吧或私人俱乐部内的一张小型圆形大理石咖啡桌旁。她留着 {argument name="hair color" default="黑色"} 及肩蓬松波浪短发，表情优雅从容，肤色为温暖的小麦色。她身着一件优雅的深 {argument name="dress color" default="酒红色"} 蕾丝晚礼服，配有透明长蕾丝袖、扇形领口和修身胸衣，呈现出迷人的夜生活时尚风格，而非暴露的裸露。她的左手在桌旁拿着一杯红酒，手指上戴着一枚简约的金戒指。环境氛围浓郁：深绿色墙壁上挂满了许多装裱好的棕褐色素描和肖像画，配有抛光的深色木质装饰、皮革座椅、古董镜子和玻璃柜，温暖的琥珀色灯光营造出一种忧郁而高档的旧世界室内感。构图采用从桌子高度略微向上的中景特写，以女性从头部到腰部为中心，红酒杯位于左下角前景，背景细节柔和。使用电影般的暖色调灯光、自然的皮肤纹理、逼真的蕾丝面料细节、浅景深、35mm 纪实摄影质感、细腻的胶片颗粒感以及丰富的对比度。无文字，无水印，无额外人物，无扭曲的手部，无夸张的解剖结构。

descriptions.en: A realistic cinematic portrait of an elegant adult woman in a burgundy lace dress holding red wine inside a moody vintage bar.
descriptions.zh: 一张写实的电影感肖像，描绘了一位优雅的成年女性身着酒红色蕾丝裙，在氛围感十足的复古酒吧中手持红酒。

cases.author: Thank you PSG.

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Realistic Train Portrait with Rainy Atmosphere

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Realistic Train Portrait with Rainy Atmosphere
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 雨天氛围下的写实火车人像

cases.promptPreview: Create a 4K realistic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young man"} standing in a running train. He stand at the train gate, holding the side railing of the gate with one hand while another hand remains in his pocket. He is looking outside the gate, appearing calm and quiet. Outside the train, beautiful ...

prompts.en: Create a 4K realistic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young man"} standing in a running train. He stand at the train gate, holding the side railing of the gate with one hand while another hand remains in his pocket. He is looking outside the gate, appearing calm and quiet. Outside the train, beautiful green mountains and wide fields are visible. It is raining, with dark and cloudy weather creating a moody atmosphere. The shot is taken from a low angle, slightly behind and beside him. Some of his face is visible, and his hairs flew with the air. He put headphone and remains immersed in the moment. He wear a {argument name="jacket style" default="dark navy cargo jacket"}, {argument name="pants style" default="relaxed-fit black jeans"}, and shoes. Preserve his skinny parsonality as uploaded image, and he is tall. Strictly preserve his facial details as uploaded image. Maintain the exact face structure, hairstyle, and identity. The overall image should have enhanced quality, realistic skin texture, cinematic lighting, and a dark effect with a moody rainy atmosphere. Ultra-detailed, highly realistic, 4K resolution.
prompts.zh: 创作一张 4K 写实人像，主角为一名站在行驶火车上的 {argument name="subject" default="年轻男子"}。他站在火车车厢连接处，一只手扶着侧面的栏杆，另一只手插在口袋里。他望向门外，神情平静而安详。火车外可见美丽的青山与广阔的田野。天正下着雨，阴沉多云的天气营造出一种忧郁的氛围。镜头采用低角度拍摄，位于他侧后方。可以看到他的部分面部，头发随风飘动。他戴着耳机，沉浸在当下的时刻。他身穿 {argument name="jacket style" default="深海军蓝工装夹克"}、{argument name="pants style" default="宽松黑色牛仔裤"} 和鞋子。请保留上传图片中他瘦削的体型，且他身材高挑。严格保留上传图片中的面部细节。保持准确的面部结构、发型和身份特征。整体图像应具备增强的画质、真实的皮肤纹理、电影级光影，以及带有忧郁雨天氛围的暗色调效果。超精细、高度写实、4K 分辨率。

descriptions.en: A cinematic prompt for generating a high-quality portrait of a young man standing at a train gate during a rainy journey, emphasizing moody atmosphere and identity preservation.
descriptions.zh: 一个用于生成高质量人像的电影感提示词，描绘了一名年轻男子在雨中旅途站在火车车厢连接处的场景，强调忧郁的氛围与身份特征保留。

The man has messy textured hair and a short rugged beard, (keep face and hair style 100% same as in uploaded image) wearing a casual {ar...

prompts.en: Ultra-cinematic dramatic red silhouette portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young man"} in side profile, captured from the shoulders up, standing in a contemplative pose. The man has messy textured hair and a short rugged beard, (keep face and hair style 100% same as in uploaded image) wearing a casual {argument name="clothing" default="dark hoodie"} with soft fabric folds and realistic cloth texture. His eyes are closed and his fingers gently touch his temple, suggesting deep thought, emotional tension, or inner conflict.
prompts.zh: 极具电影感的戏剧性红色剪影肖像，主角为 {argument name="subject" default="年轻男性"} 的侧面轮廓，取景范围从肩部以上，呈现沉思姿态。该男性留着凌乱且富有质感的发型，以及短而粗犷的胡须（请保持面部和发型与上传图片 100% 一致），身穿一件休闲的 {argument name="clothing" default="深色连帽衫"}，衣物褶皱柔软，布料纹理真实。他双眼紧闭，手指轻触太阳穴，流露出深思、情感张力或内心冲突。

descriptions.en: Generates a dramatic red silhouette portrait of a man with textured hair and a rugged beard, focusing on emotional tension.
descriptions.zh: 生成一张极具戏剧性的红色剪影肖像，主角为一名留着质感发型和粗犷胡须的男性，着重表现情感张力。

cases.promptPreview: Ultra-realistic cyberpunk expressionist portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="rugged 44-year-old Eastern European man"} with {argument name="hair" default="short dark-blond hair"}, {argument name="eyes" default="piercing light-blue eyes"}, strong masculine facial features, and a neatly trimmed beard. The man...

prompts.en:
Ultra-realistic cyberpunk expressionist portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="rugged 44-year-old Eastern European man"} with {argument name="hair" default="short dark-blond hair"}, {argument name="eyes" default="piercing light-blue eyes"}, strong masculine facial features, and a neatly trimmed beard. The man gazes upward with determination and vision, symbolizing ambition, resilience, and future success.
The artwork combines hyper-realistic facial detail with bold abstract digital paint strokes. Electric cyan-blue and vibrant neon-magenta colours dominate the composition, flowing across the face, clothing, and background like energetic brushstrokes and fractured light shards.
The subject wears a dark modern cap and urban streetwear jacket. Dynamic paint splashes, scratches, fragmented textures, glowing particles, and expressive artistic strokes create movement and emotion throughout the image.
Cinematic lighting illuminates the face from opposite sides with blue and magenta neon light. Highly detailed skin texture, realistic beard detail, reflective eyes, dramatic shadows, and rich contrast. Dark black background enhances the glowing colours and futuristic atmosphere.
Digital masterpiece, cyberpunk expressionism, abstract portrait art, ultra-detailed, vibrant neon colours, emotional storytelling, 8K quality, vertical 9:16 composition.
prompts.zh:
超写实赛博朋克表现主义肖像，主角为 {argument name="subject" default="一位粗犷的 44 岁东欧男性"}，留着 {argument name="hair" default="深金色短发"}，拥有 {argument name="eyes" default="深邃的浅蓝色眼睛"}，具备刚毅的男性面部特征和修剪整齐的胡须。他目光坚定地望向远方，象征着雄心、韧性与未来的成功。

这件艺术品将超写实的面部细节与大胆的抽象数字笔触相结合。电光青色与鲜艳的霓虹洋红色主导了整个构图，如同充满活力的笔触和破碎的光影碎片，流淌在面部、服装与背景之上。

主角身穿深色现代鸭舌帽和都市街头风格夹克。动态的油漆飞溅、划痕、碎片化纹理、发光粒子以及极具表现力的艺术笔触，为整幅图像注入了动感与情感。

电影级光效从两侧以蓝色和洋红色霓虹光照亮面部。呈现高度细腻的皮肤纹理、逼真的胡须细节、富有神采的眼睛、戏剧性的阴影以及丰富的对比度。深黑色背景进一步突显了发光的色彩与未来主义氛围。

数字杰作，赛博朋克表现主义，抽象肖像艺术，超精细，鲜艳的霓虹色彩，情感叙事，8K 画质，9:16 竖屏构图。

descriptions.en: Generates a hyper-realistic yet abstract cyberpunk portrait of a man, featuring vibrant neon colors and expressive digital brushstrokes.
descriptions.zh: 生成一张超写实且兼具抽象风格的赛博朋克男性肖像，呈现鲜艳的霓虹色彩与极具表现力的数字笔触。

cases.promptPreview: A cinematic editorial portrait of a mysterious {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} with long straight black hair standing closely beside a {argument name="animal" default="majestic black horse"} in a {argument name="setting" default="vast open steppe"}, both facing forward with a calm, powerful, almost myt...

prompts.en: A cinematic editorial portrait of a mysterious {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} with long straight black hair standing closely beside a {argument name="animal" default="majestic black horse"} in a {argument name="setting" default="vast open steppe"}, both facing forward with a calm, powerful, almost mythical presence, the woman wearing an oversized black hoodie and dark cargo pants with hands in her pockets, pale natural skin, sharp delicate features, intense gaze, strands of hair softly moving in the wind, the horse's deep black coat catching subtle highlights, dramatic storm clouds gathering across the sky, distant mountains fading into soft haze, dry golden grass stretching endlessly around them, evoking solitude, strength, elegance, and an unspoken bond between human and animal, captured in moody late afternoon light, shot with a Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 lens, ultra realistic detail, shallow depth of field, rich blacks, muted earth tones, cinematic contrast, breathtaking photorealism
prompts.zh: 一张电影编辑风格的肖像照，描绘了一位神秘的 {argument name="subject" default="年轻女子"}，她留着黑色长直发，紧挨着一匹 {argument name="animal" default="雄伟的黑马"} 站在 {argument name="setting" default="广阔的开阔草原"} 上。两人都面向前方，展现出一种冷静、强大且近乎神话般的气质。女子身穿超大号黑色连帽衫和深色工装裤，双手插在口袋里，皮肤白皙自然，五官精致锐利，眼神深邃，发丝在风中轻轻飘动。马匹深黑色的皮毛捕捉着细微的高光，天空中聚集着戏剧性的乌云，远处的山脉隐没在柔和的薄雾中，干燥的金色草地在周围无尽延伸。画面唤起了一种孤独、力量、优雅以及人与动物之间无言的羁绊。在午后忧郁的光线下拍摄，使用 Sony A7R IV 相机，85mm f/1.4 镜头，超逼真细节，浅景深，浓郁的黑色，柔和的大地色调，电影级对比度，令人惊叹的写实感。

descriptions.en: An editorial-style cinematic portrait of a woman standing beside a majestic black horse in a vast golden steppe under storm clouds.
descriptions.zh: 一张电影编辑风格的肖像照，描绘了一位女子站在广阔金色草原上，身旁是一匹雄伟的黑马，背景是乌云密布的天空。

titles.en: Product Marketing - Premium Football Campaign Poster

cases.promptPreview: Create an ultra-premium football campaign poster in a vertical 4:5 format, designed like an official {argument name="event" default="FIFA World Cup"} advertisement. The style should be hyper-realistic, cinematic, luxury-focused, and emotionally powerful, with a dark minimalist sports-poster aesthetic. Use the uploaded...

prompts.en: Create an ultra-premium football campaign poster in a vertical 4:5 format, designed like an official {argument name="event" default="FIFA World Cup"} advertisement. The style should be hyper-realistic, cinematic, luxury-focused, and emotionally powerful, with a dark minimalist sports-poster aesthetic. Use the uploaded reference image as the person on the left side. Preserve her facial identity with maximum accuracy, including facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, hairstyle, proportions, and overall likeness. She should remain instantly recognizable while naturally integrated into the football poster. On the right side place {argument name="player" default="Cristiano Ronaldo"}, rendered with highly realistic facial detail and professional sports-photography quality. Both subjects should be shown from the waist up, standing back-to-back with folded arms, looking directly into the camera with calm confidence, champion mentality, and elite athlete energy. Dress both characters in the current {argument name="team" default="Portugal national team"} home jersey, featuring realistic fabric texture, authentic collar design, sleeve trim, stitching details, accurate badge placement, subtle fabric patterns, and premium match-kit realism. The jersey should look professionally photographed with natural folds and realistic lighting. The composition should feature a mostly black background with dramatic contrast and selective highlights. Behind the subjects, add three tall glowing vertical light bars inspired by the Portuguese flag colors (green, red, and gold). Include a large faded Portugal flag blended subtly into the background for depth and atmosphere. Add realistic stadium haze, drifting smoke, floating dust particles, cinematic shadows, soft lens flares, glossy jersey reflections, and premium sports-advertising lighting. Use subtle neon edge lighting around the subjects to separate them from the dark background. Include elegant and minimal football-themed typography integrated into the design, such as: PORTUGAL RONALDO WORLD CUP 2026 Keep all text clean, modern, premium, and understated. Color grading should be based on deep blacks, rich reds, emerald greens, warm gold accents, and clean white highlights. The final image should feel emotional, elite, dramatic, and worthy of a global football campaign. Ultra-realistic skin textures, razor-sharp focus, authentic jersey materials, cinematic depth, professional sports-poster composition, and 8K-quality detailing throughout.
prompts.zh: 创作一张 4:5 竖构图的超高端足球宣传海报，设计风格参考官方 {argument name="event" default="FIFA World Cup"} 广告。整体风格应具备超写实、电影感、奢华质感与强烈的情感张力，呈现深色极简主义的体育海报美学。将上传的参考图像作为左侧人物，需最大程度还原其面部特征，包括脸型、眼睛、鼻子、嘴唇、肤色、发型、比例及整体相似度，确保人物既能被一眼认出，又能自然融入足球海报中。右侧放置 {argument name="player" default="Cristiano Ronaldo"}，呈现高度写实的面部细节和专业体育摄影质感。两位主体均采用半身像，背靠背站立，双臂交叉，直视镜头，展现出冷静的自信、冠军心态和精英运动员的气场。两人均身着当前的 {argument name="team" default="Portugal national team"} 主场球衣，展现逼真的面料质感、正版领口设计、袖口饰边、缝线细节、准确的队徽位置、细腻的织物纹理以及高端比赛服的真实感。球衣应呈现出专业摄影效果，带有自然的褶皱和逼真的光影。构图以黑色背景为主，营造强烈的对比度和局部高光。在主体身后，添加三条受葡萄牙国旗颜色（绿色、红色和金色）启发的竖向发光灯柱。背景中融入一面隐约可见的巨大葡萄牙国旗，以增加深度和氛围感。加入逼真的球场烟雾、漂浮的尘埃颗粒、电影级阴影、柔和的镜头光晕、球衣的亮面反射以及高端体育广告灯光。在主体周围使用微妙的霓虹边缘光，使其与深色背景分离。设计中融入优雅且极简的足球主题字体，例如：PORTUGAL RONALDO WORLD CUP 2026。保持所有文字简洁、现代、高端且低调。调色方案应基于深黑、浓郁红、翡翠绿、暖金色调以及纯净的白色高光。最终图像应充满情感、精英感、戏剧性，并具备全球足球宣传活动的质感。具备超写实的皮肤纹理、锐利的对焦、真实的球衣材质、电影级的景深、专业的体育海报构图以及全程 8K 质量的细节呈现。

descriptions.en: Creates a hyper-realistic, luxury sports poster featuring a reference subject alongside Cristiano Ronaldo in Portugal national team jerseys.
descriptions.zh: 创作一张超写实、奢华的体育海报，将参考人物与 Cristiano Ronaldo 一同置于葡萄牙国家队球衣造型中。

Keep the original face recognizable but convert into an {argument name="style" default="adorable miniature chibi doll"} with oversized cute eyes and collectible doll proportions.
prompts.zh: 将第一个参考人物转换为第二个参考图像的风格，同时精准保留面部特征、眼睛、嘴唇、发型和柔和的表情。在保持原有人物可辨识度的基础上，将其转换为 {argument name="style" default="可爱的迷你 Q 版人偶"}，并呈现出大眼睛和收藏级人偶的比例。

descriptions.en: Transforms a person's photo into an adorable miniature chibi doll style while maintaining their facial identity.
descriptions.zh: 将人物照片转换为可爱的迷你 Q 版人偶风格，同时保留其面部特征。

cases.author: Fatema

cases.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - Expedition Planning Strategic Board

titles.en: Infographic / Edu Visual - Expedition Planning Strategic Board
titles.zh: 信息图 / 教育视觉图 - 远征规划战略项目

cases.promptPreview: A strategic command board for an expedition leader planning {argument name="mission type" default="[JOURNEY / MISSION]"} to {argument name="location" default="[DESTINATION / ERA]"}. Left panel: detailed topographic route map with labeled waypoints, annotated danger zones, and a timeline running along the edge. Center ...

prompts.en: A strategic command board for an expedition leader planning {argument name="mission type" default="[JOURNEY / MISSION]"} to {argument name="location" default="[DESTINATION / ERA]"}. Left panel: detailed topographic route map with labeled waypoints, annotated danger zones, and a timeline running along the edge. Center panel: overhead flat lay of every piece of kit in neat organized rows, each item tagged by weight and function, redundancies flagged, nothing unnecessary included. Right panel: the expedition in motion or the destination reached, small human figures against a vast landscape, scale unmistakable. Visual language shifts from cartographic precision through functional inventory documentation to sweeping epic environmental photography. Title block reads: "{argument name="expedition name" default="[EXPEDITION NAME]"} — [ROUTE], [DATE], [OBJECTIVE]".
prompts.zh: 为正在规划 {argument name="mission type" default="[旅程 / 任务]"} 前往 {argument name="location" default="[目的地 / 时代]"} 的远征队长提供的战略指挥项目。左侧面板：详细的地形路线图，标注了航点、危险区域，边缘处设有时间轴。中央面板：所有装备的俯视平铺图，按整齐的行排列，每件物品均标注了重量和功能，标记了冗余项，不包含任何多余物品。右侧面板：远征进行中或抵达目的地时的场景，广阔景观中点缀着渺小的人物，比例感鲜明。视觉语言从制图的精确性，过渡到功能性清单记录，再到宏大的史诗级环境摄影。标题栏显示：“{argument name="expedition name" default="[远征名称]"} — [路线], [日期], [目标]”。

descriptions.en: Generates a comprehensive expedition planning board layout including topographic maps, functional kit inventories, and environmental photography to plan a specific mission.
descriptions.zh: 生成一份全面的远征规划项目布局，包含地形图、功能性装备清单和环境摄影，以规划特定任务。

cases.author: PromptLab

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Sunflower Field Frame Portrait

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Sunflower Field Frame Portrait
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 向日葵花田画框人像

cases.promptPreview: A very tight vertical frame with strong crop pressure, the subject positioned inside a dense {argument name="flower type" default="sunflower"} and orange flower field while partially framed by a large tilted wooden picture frame near the center of the image. Large blurred sunflower blooms dominate the upper-right fore...

prompts.en: A very tight vertical frame with strong crop pressure, the subject positioned inside a dense {argument name="flower type" default="sunflower"} and orange flower field while partially framed by a large tilted wooden picture frame near the center of the image. Large blurred sunflower blooms dominate the upper-right foreground and left foreground edges, partially blocking the frame and subject. The wooden frame leans diagonally from lower-left toward upper-right, surrounding the face and upper torso area while several edges are cropped by foreground flowers and frame borders. Pale blue sky with soft white clouds occupies the upper-left background, with dense green foliage and orange flowers filling the lower and middle background. Preserve the exact asymmetrical placement and tight crop without revealing more body or environment. The face appears near the upper-center area inside the wooden frame, tilted slightly downward toward viewer’s left, eyes open wide directed toward the camera axis, pupils centered, lips softly closed with a slight pout shape and faint glossy pink color. Makeup is soft and bright with pale pink blush, peach-pink eyeshadow, subtle eyeliner, glossy pink lips, smooth bright skin with warm highlights. Small flower stickers remain visible on the cheek. Dark medium-length hair falls around both sides of the face and shoulder area with loose strands near the forehead and cheek, a yellow flower accessory tucked into the hair near the viewer’s left side of the head. One hand grips the lower-left side of the wooden frame while the other arm remains lower and partly hidden by flowers and leaves. Clothing must remain unchanged: a vivid {argument name="top color" default="cobalt-blue"} short-sleeve knit top, close-fitting over the upper torso, with a simple round crew neckline sitting close to the base of the neck, smooth fine-knit fabric texture, short sleeves ending around the upper arm, sleeve edges slightly curved around the arms, fabric softly stretched across the chest and shoulder area with mild natural folds and highlights, no visible logo or pattern. Dense sunflower leaves and stems overlap the lower foreground and right side with several leaves and flowers heavily blurred and cropped by the frame edges. Bright warm sunlight creates strong dreamy haze, pale overexposed highlights, and soft translucent lens flare artifacts near the upper-left and lower-left areas. Dreamy soft-focus image quality, reduced edge sharpness, shallow depth of field, blurred foreground flowers, and soft yellow-green background separation.
prompts.zh: 极度紧凑的竖构图，具有强烈的裁剪压迫感。主体位于茂密的 {argument name="flower type" default="向日葵"} 与橙色花丛中，并被画面中央附近一个倾斜的大型木质画框部分框住。右上方和左前方的边缘处有巨大的模糊向日葵花朵，部分遮挡了画框和主体。木质画框从左下向右上倾斜，环绕着面部和上半身，部分边缘被前景花朵和画框边界裁剪。左上角背景为淡蓝色天空与柔和的白云，中下部背景则填满了茂密的绿叶与橙色花朵。请保持这种不对称的布局和紧凑的裁剪，不要露出更多的身体或环境。面部位于木质画框内的上方中央附近，略微向观察者的左侧倾斜，双眼睁大并注视镜头轴线，瞳孔居中，双唇轻闭，呈微嘟状，带有淡淡的粉色光泽。妆容柔和明亮，配有淡粉色腮红、桃粉色眼影、精致眼线，唇部光泽感强，皮肤光滑明亮，带有温暖的高光。脸颊上保留着小花贴纸。中等长度的深色头发垂在脸部两侧和肩部周围，前额和脸颊处有几缕碎发，观察者左侧的头发上别着一朵黄色花饰。一只手抓着木质画框的左下侧，另一只手臂保持在下方，被花叶部分遮挡。服装必须保持不变：一件鲜艳的 {argument name="top color" default="钴蓝色"} 短袖针织上衣，紧贴上半身，圆领设计紧贴颈部基底，面料呈现平滑的细针织纹理，短袖覆盖至上臂，袖口略微贴合手臂曲线，面料在胸部和肩部自然拉伸，带有轻微的自然褶皱与高光，无可见标志或图案。茂密的向日葵叶片和茎秆重叠在前景下方和右侧，多片叶子和花朵被画框边缘严重虚化并裁剪。明亮温暖的阳光营造出强烈的梦幻朦胧感、淡色的过曝高光，以及左上和左下区域柔和的半透明镜头光晕。画面呈现梦幻般的柔焦质感，边缘锐度降低，景深较浅，前景花朵模糊，背景呈现柔和的黄绿色分离效果。

descriptions.zh: 一个梦幻般的柔焦提示词，画面主体被置于茂密向日葵花田中的木质画框内，呈现出温暖的阳光与朦胧感。

cases.promptPreview: Ultra realistic commercial airline advertisement editorial styled like a bold sports campaign poster featuring three {argument name="airline company" default="QATAR AIRWAYS"} crew members in a heroic half-body crop, rising dramatically from the lower frame, shot straight-on slightly below eye level, 4:5 vertical. Cent...

prompts.en: Ultra realistic commercial airline advertisement editorial styled like a bold sports campaign poster featuring three {argument name="airline company" default="QATAR AIRWAYS"} crew members in a heroic half-body crop, rising dramatically from the lower frame, shot straight-on slightly below eye level, 4:5 vertical. Center: a male pilot in a dark navy double-breasted blazer with gold captain epaulettes and gold buttons, navy tie, direct forward gaze, intense expression. Flanking him symmetrically: two female flight attendants in identical {argument name="uniform color" default="deep magenta-purple"} fitted blazer uniforms with gold buttons, matching magenta pillbox hats with small gold phoenix pins, white floral-patterned silk neckerchiefs, pearl stud earrings both with composed off-camera gazes in opposite directions. Subjects visible from chest/waist up only, cut off at the bottom of frame for maximum graphic impact. In the lower foreground: a white commercial aircraft fuselage with branding and the geometric logo on the tail. Background: deep teal-blue dusk sky with dramatic golden-orange backlit clouds, modern glass airport terminal and warm stadium floodlights on the left. Lighting is cinematic dramatic: strong warm amber key from left, cool blue hour fill, deep rich shadows, prestige color grade teal and orange complementary palette. Graphic sports-campaign poster composition, bold and aspirational, tack-sharp on all three subjects, 4:5 vertical.
prompts.zh: 超写实商业航空公司广告大片，采用大胆的体育运动宣传海报风格，三位 {argument name="airline company" default="QATAR AIRWAYS"} 机组人员以英雄式的半身剪裁呈现，从画面下方戏剧性地升起，采用略低于视线的正面拍摄视角，4:5 竖构图。中心：一位男性飞行员，身着深海军蓝双排扣西装外套，佩戴金色机长肩章和金色纽扣，系海军蓝领带，直视前方，表情坚定。两侧对称排列：两位女性空乘人员，身着相同的 {argument name="uniform color" default="深洋红色"} 修身西装制服，配有金色纽扣，佩戴同色系洋红色药盒帽，帽上饰有小型金色凤凰徽章，系白色花纹丝绸领巾，佩戴珍珠耳钉，两人均神情从容，目光投向画外两侧。主体仅露出胸部/腰部以上，底部切边以获得最大的视觉冲击力。画面下方前景：一架带有品牌标识及尾翼几何 Logo 的白色商用飞机机身。背景：深青蓝色黄昏天空，伴有戏剧性的金橙色背光云层，左侧为现代玻璃机场航站楼和温暖的体育场泛光灯。灯光具有电影般的戏剧感：左侧强烈的暖琥珀色主光，冷蓝色小时补光，深邃丰富的阴影，采用青橙互补色的高级调色风格。图形化的体育运动宣传海报构图，大胆且充满抱负，三位主体均清晰锐利，4:5 竖构图。

cases.promptPreview: Ultra-realistic IMAX-level Netflix-style cinematic surreal fashion portrait, 9:16 vertical composition, a dreamy high-end editorial scene featuring a beautiful young woman standing gracefully on a small floating {argument name="platform material" default="wooden"} platform surrounded by soft layered clouds in the sky,...

prompts.en: Ultra-realistic IMAX-level Netflix-style cinematic surreal fashion portrait, 9:16 vertical composition, a dreamy high-end editorial scene featuring a beautiful young woman standing gracefully on a small floating {argument name="platform material" default="wooden"} platform surrounded by soft layered clouds in the sky, while a massive semi-transparent close-up portrait of the same woman appears beautifully in the background clouds as an ethereal double-exposure style composition, the woman wearing elegant round black sunglasses and a flowing {argument name="dress color" default="blush-pink"} satin slip dress with a smooth luxurious fabric drape, long soft wavy light-brown hair styled in polished loose waves with natural volume and gentle movement, her face showing calm confidence, soft feminine elegance and a graceful self-assured mood, with relaxed brows, softly defined lips and a subtle attractive expression, the smaller full-body figure standing in a poised fashion pose with one hand on her waist and the other relaxed naturally, the giant portrait behind her turned slightly sideways for a premium editorial feel, background filled with voluminous clouds and atmospheric sky depth, enhanced with dramatic high-contrast evening golden-hour lighting, rich sunset glow, warm amber highlights, glowing golden edges, soft orange-peach sky illumination and deeper creamy shadow contrast, strong cinematic light separation between highlights and shadows, luminous golden rim light on the hair and dress, soft mist around the floating platform, ultra-rich color grading with warm champagne tones, creamy beige clouds, golden highlights and elegant sunset contrast, photorealistic rendering, premium luxury fashion poster aesthetic, HDR, masterpiece quality, ultra-detailed, cinematic beauty atmosphere, sharp facial detail, dreamy yet powerful visual storytelling.
prompts.zh: 超写实 IMAX 级 Netflix 风格电影感超现实时尚人像，9:16 竖构图，梦幻般的高端杂志大片场景，一位美丽的年轻女性优雅地站在一个小型的 {argument name="platform material" default="木质"} 悬浮平台上，周围环绕着天空中柔软的层叠云朵，同时，同一个女性巨大的半透明特写肖像以空灵的双重曝光风格构图，唯美地呈现在背景云层中。女性佩戴着优雅的黑色圆框太阳镜，身穿一件飘逸的 {argument name="dress color" default="淡粉色"} 缎面吊带裙，面料顺滑且富有奢华的垂坠感。长而柔软的浅棕色波浪卷发经过精心打理，呈现出自然的蓬松感与轻盈的动感。她的面部表情展现出冷静的自信、柔美的优雅以及从容的气质，眉目舒展，唇部轮廓柔和，神情极具吸引力。较小的全身人像以时尚姿态站立，一只手叉腰，另一只手自然放松；背景中巨大的肖像微微侧转，营造出高级的杂志感。背景充盈着丰盈的云朵与深邃的天空，增强了戏剧性的高对比度黄金时刻光影，浓郁的夕阳余晖，温暖的琥珀色高光，发光的金色边缘，柔和的橙桃色天空照明与更深邃的奶油色阴影对比。高光与阴影之间强烈的电影级光影分离，发丝与裙摆上闪烁着金色的轮廓光，悬浮平台周围环绕着轻柔的薄雾。色彩分级极其丰富，带有温暖的香槟色调、奶油米色云层、金色高光与优雅的夕阳对比。照片级渲染，高端奢华时尚海报美学，HDR，大师级品质，超精细细节，电影级美学氛围，清晰的面部细节，梦幻而又充满力量的视觉叙事。

Indoor photobooth setting with a solid l...

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Minecraft Selfie Photo Integration

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Minecraft Selfie Photo Integration
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - Minecraft 自拍照片集成

cases.promptPreview: Use the provided {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"} reference photo as the highest-priority facial reference. Preserve {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"}’s facial identity exactly. The viewer must instantly recognize {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"}. Preserve his ex...

prompts.en: Use the provided {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"} reference photo as the highest-priority facial reference. Preserve {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"}’s facial identity exactly. The viewer must instantly recognize {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"}. Preserve his exact hairstyle, facial proportions, beard shadow, eyebrows, eye shape, nose, lips, jawline, skin texture, and all unique facial characteristics. {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"} must remain fully photorealistic. Vertical composition — 1080×1350. Create an ultra-cinematic Minecraft-inspired selfie scene. The selfie is being taken by Steve from Minecraft, who occupies the foreground and holds the camera with one arm fully extended toward the viewer, creating the exact perspective of a real smartphone selfie. Steve smiles directly at the camera with a fun, friendly, and adventurous expression. Behind Steve stands {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"}, fully photorealistic and naturally integrated into the Minecraft universe through realistic lighting, atmosphere, and cinematic color grading. {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"} smiles naturally while holding a Minecraft wolf comfortably in his arms. The wolf appears relaxed, friendly, and secure, creating a wholesome and memorable moment. The scene takes place in a breathtaking Minecraft valley during golden hour sunset. The environment is rich with detail, featuring lush green grass, beautiful rivers, wooden Minecraft houses, hanging lanterns, charming bridges, colorful flowers, giant trees, distant mountains, waterfalls, and a peaceful village atmosphere. The camera angle must feel exactly like a real group selfie. Steve dominates the foreground because he is holding the camera, while {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"} appears slightly behind him but remains clearly visible, recognizable, and well-lit. The wolf becomes an important secondary focal point, positioned naturally within {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"}’s arms. Warm golden sunset light bathes the entire scene. Beautiful volumetric god rays pass through the trees and mountains. Floating fireflies, subtle voxel particles, atmospheric dust, and soft environmental haze add life, depth, and realism. The image should feel joyful, adventurous, cinematic, and authentic, like a behind-the-scenes photograph taken during an epic Minecraft movie adventure. The environment must feel alive and immersive rather than resembling a gameplay screenshot. Visual style: Minecraft Movie × Pixar-level storytelling × Unreal Engine 5 cinematic lighting × AAA game promotional artwork. Ultra-realistic photography, masterpiece composition, cinematic depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, volumetric lighting, realistic skin texture, realistic clothing folds, atmospheric perspective, highly detailed Minecraft environment, blockbuster movie quality, 8K resolution, ultra-sharp focus, visually unforgettable, premium Instagram cover quality.
prompts.zh: 请使用提供的 {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"} 参考照片作为最高优先级的面部参考。请务必完整保留 {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"} 的面部特征。观众必须能一眼认出 {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"}。请保留他精确的发型、面部比例、胡茬、眉毛、眼型、鼻子、嘴唇、下颌线、皮肤纹理以及所有独特的面部特征。{argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"} 必须保持完全的写实感。垂直构图 — 1080×1350。创建一个超电影感的 Minecraft 主题自拍场景。自拍由 Minecraft 中的 Steve 拍摄，他位于前景，单臂完全伸向观众，呈现出真实智能手机自拍的视角。Steve 对着镜头微笑，表情生动、友好且充满冒险精神。在 Steve 身后站着 {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"}，他呈现出完全的写实感，并通过逼真的光影、氛围和电影级调色自然地融入 Minecraft 宇宙中。{argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"} 自然地微笑着，怀里舒适地抱着一只 Minecraft 狼。狼看起来放松、友好且有安全感，营造出一个温馨而难忘的瞬间。场景设定在黄金时段日落时分，风景如画的 Minecraft 山谷中。环境细节丰富，拥有茂密的绿草、美丽的河流、木质 Minecraft 房屋、悬挂的灯笼、迷人的桥梁、色彩斑斓的花朵、参天大树、远处的山脉、瀑布以及宁静的村庄氛围。摄像机角度必须感觉就像真实的合影自拍。Steve 因为拿着相机而占据前景，而 {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"} 略微在他身后，但依然清晰可见、易于辨认且光线充足。狼成为重要的次要焦点，自然地位于 {argument name="person name" default="Rafa Franco"} 的怀抱中。温暖的金色夕阳沐浴着整个场景。美丽的体积光穿过树木和山脉。漂浮的萤火虫、细微的体素粒子、大气尘埃和柔和的环境雾气增添了生机、深度和真实感。画面应充满欢乐、冒险感、电影感和真实感，就像在史诗般的 Minecraft 电影冒险中拍摄的幕后照片。环境必须感觉生动且具有沉浸感，而不是像游戏截图。视觉风格：Minecraft 电影 × 皮克斯级别的叙事 × Unreal Engine 5 电影级灯光 × 3A 游戏宣传艺术。超写实摄影、大师级构图、电影级景深、光线追踪、全局光照、体积光、逼真的皮肤纹理、真实的衣物褶皱、大气透视、高度精细的 Minecraft 环境、大片级质量、8K 分辨率、超清晰对焦、视觉上令人难忘、优质 Instagram 封面质量。

descriptions.en: A cinematic prompt that integrates a specific person's likeness into a photorealistic Minecraft movie scene as a smartphone selfie.
descriptions.zh: 一个将特定人物肖像融入写实风格 Minecraft 电影场景，并呈现为智能手机自拍效果的电影级提示词。

cases.author: Lariab Fatima‎

cases.title: Comic / Storyboard - Cinematic Character Identity Board

titles.en: Comic / Storyboard - Cinematic Character Identity Board
titles.zh: 漫画 / 故事板 - 电影级角色身份项目

cases.promptPreview: Create an artistic 16:9 CHARACTER IDENTITY BOARD. Use Image A as the subject and the visual medium. Name: {argument name="name" default="Clara"}. {argument name="correction" default="Fix headphones"}. (just change this line as your needs.) Soft off-white background. No environment, no logo, no watermark. DESIGN DIRECT...

prompts.en:
Create an artistic 16:9 CHARACTER IDENTITY BOARD.

Use Image A as the subject and the visual medium. Name: {argument name="name" default="Clara"}. {argument name="correction" default="Fix headphones"}. (just change this line as your needs.)

Soft off-white background. No environment, no logo, no watermark.

DESIGN DIRECTION:
Do not create a standard character reference sheet.
Create a cinematic identity board that feels like a high-end animation studio character study mixed with an artbook layout.

The layout should be asymmetrical, elegant and visually memorable.
Use large empty space, varied image scale and intentional imbalance.
Avoid grids, blueprint design, catalog layout and repetitive turnaround presentation.

IMPORTANT LAYOUT RULE:
Do not overlap any character images.
Every view must have clear separation and breathing room.
Keep all bodies, portraits, silhouettes and detail studies visually distinct.
No cropped faces, no hidden limbs, no stacked figures, no merged poses.

MAIN COMPOSITION:
Place one large hero full-body view slightly off-center as the visual anchor.

Around it, arrange smaller supporting studies with clean spacing:
neutral full-body view, back view, profile view, seated pose, leaning pose, crouching pose, top-down body angle, low-angle body angle, expressive portrait studies.

Each view should feel like a separate clean character study, not a frame from one scene.

IDENTITY LOCK:
Preserve strict identity consistency across all views:
same face, same facial proportions, same hairstyle, same outfit, same body proportions, same posture language, same visual personality.

USEFUL REFERENCE DETAILS:
Make the character readable for future image and video generation:
clear face shape, clear hair silhouette, clear outfit silhouette, clear body shape, clear hands, clear posture, clear expression range.

ARTISTIC SECTIONS:
Include a small silhouette study area with 2-3 simplified black character silhouettes.
Include a small expression study area with subtle emotional variations.
Include a small detail study area showing key visual features of the face, hair and outfit.

TEXT DESIGN:
Add one stylish CHARACTER ID block.
Keep it minimal, bold and art-directed.
Use only:
NAME
ROLE
CORE MOOD
VISUAL SIGNATURE

Use small handwritten-style labels only where helpful.
Subtle editorial arrows and annotation marks are allowed, but keep them minimal and elegant.

STYLE:
minimal, cinematic, premium, artbook-like, clean, expressive, useful for production.

The final image should feel like an artistic character identity board designed
prompts.zh:
创建一个 16:9 的艺术化角色身份项目（CHARACTER IDENTITY BOARD）。

以图像 A 作为主体和视觉媒介。名称：{argument name="name" default="Clara"}。{argument name="correction" default="Fix headphones"}。（根据你的需求修改此行。）

柔和的米白色背景。无环境背景，无 Logo，无水印。

设计方向：
不要创建标准的角色参考图。
创建一个电影级的身份项目，使其看起来像是高端动画工作室的角色研究与艺术画册排版的结合体。

排版应是不对称的、优雅且令人印象深刻的。
利用大面积留白、多变的图像比例和刻意的不平衡感。
避免使用网格、蓝图设计、目录式排版以及重复的转向展示。

重要排版规则：
不要让任何角色图像重叠。
每个视图都必须有清晰的间距和呼吸感。
保持所有全身像、肖像、剪影和细节研究在视觉上相互独立。
禁止面部裁剪、肢体遮挡、堆叠人物或姿势重叠。

主要构图：
放置一个略微偏离中心的大型全身英雄视图作为视觉锚点。

在其周围，以整洁的间距排列较小的辅助研究图：
中性全身视图、背面视图、侧面视图、坐姿、倚靠姿势、蹲姿、俯视角度、仰视角度以及表情研究。

每个视图都应感觉像是独立的、清晰的角色研究，而不是同一场景中的帧。

身份锁定：
在所有视图中保持严格的身份一致性：
相同的面部、相同的面部比例、相同的发型、相同的服装、相同的身体比例、相同的姿态语言、相同的视觉个性。

实用的参考细节：
使角色易于识别，以便进行后续的图像和视频生成：
清晰的脸型、清晰的发型轮廓、清晰的服装轮廓、清晰的体型、清晰的手部、清晰的姿态、清晰的表情范围。

艺术板块：
包含一个小型剪影研究区，展示 2-3 个简化的黑色角色剪影。
包含一个小型表情研究区，展示细微的情绪变化。
包含一个小型细节研究区，展示面部、头发和服装的关键视觉特征。

文字设计：
添加一个时尚的角色 ID 模块。
保持极简、醒目且具有艺术指导感。
仅使用：
姓名 (NAME)
角色 (ROLE)
核心情绪 (CORE MOOD)
视觉特征 (VISUAL SIGNATURE)

仅在必要时使用小型的书写体标签。
允许使用细微的编辑箭头和注释标记，但要保持极简和优雅。

风格：
极简、电影感、高级、画册感、整洁、表现力强、适用于生产流程。

最终图像应呈现出一种艺术化的角色身份项目设计感。

descriptions.en: An artistic prompt for creating high-end character sheets that feel like studio animation identity boards rather than simple grids.
descriptions.zh: 一个用于创作高端角色设定集的艺术提示词，旨在打造出如同动画工作室角色研究项目般的视觉效果，而非简单的网格排版。

Classic Rembrandt lighting setup, single soft key light positioned 45 degrees to ca...

prompts.en: Photorealistic black and white cinematic portrait of {argument name="subject" default="a rugged middle aged man"} with short hair, light beard stubble, sharp facial details, intense serious expression, looking directly into the camera. Classic Rembrandt lighting setup, single soft key light positioned 45 degrees to camera right and slightly above eye level, distinct triangle of light under the shadow side eye, deep shadows on one side of the face, high contrast low key lighting, pure black background, fine art studio portrait, dramatic mood, chiaroscuro, ultra detailed skin texture, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, masterpiece quality.
prompts.zh: 逼真的黑白电影感人像，主角为 {argument name="subject" default="一位粗犷的中年男子"}，短发，留着浅浅的胡茬，面部细节清晰，表情严肃而强烈，直视镜头。采用经典伦勃朗布光设置，单侧柔光主灯置于相机右侧 45 度且略高于视线水平，阴影侧眼睛下方形成明显的三角形光斑，面部一侧呈现深邃阴影，高对比度低调照明，纯黑背景，艺术摄影棚人像，戏剧性氛围，明暗对照法，超精细皮肤纹理，85mm 镜头，浅景深，大师级品质。

descriptions.en: A professional studio portrait prompt using Rembrandt lighting for high-contrast, dramatic results.
descriptions.zh: 一个使用伦勃朗光打造高对比度、戏剧性效果的专业摄影棚人像提示词。

cases.promptPreview: Transform the uploaded photo into a cute black-and-white hand-drawn chibi doodle illustration. Preserve the exact pose, composition, facial expressions, clothing, sunglasses, and antler headband while converting {argument name="subjects" default="the mother and child"} into adorable cartoon characters with oversized h...

prompts.en: Transform the uploaded photo into a cute black-and-white hand-drawn chibi doodle illustration. Preserve the exact pose, composition, facial expressions, clothing, sunglasses, and antler headband while converting {argument name="subjects" default="the mother and child"} into adorable cartoon characters with oversized heads, tiny bodies, round eyes, soft smiles, and simplified features. Use clean black ink linework on a pure white background with subtle sketch hatching, playful hand-drawn texture, tiny hearts, sparkles, and cute doodle accents around them. Maintain the warm hug, joyful family connection, and candid photo-booth perspective. Kawaii manga-inspired art style, minimalist monochrome palette, sticker-pack aesthetic, wholesome children's storybook illustration, charming sketchbook drawing, expressive faces, soft rounded shapes, cozy and heartwarming mood, highly detailed line art, cute social media avatar style, masterpiece quality.
prompts.zh: 将上传的照片转换为可爱的黑白手绘 Q 版涂鸦插画。在转换 {argument name="subjects" default="母子"} 时，请保留原图的姿势、构图、面部表情、服装、太阳镜和鹿角发箍，并将人物转化为拥有大头、小身体、圆眼睛、柔和微笑和简化特征的可爱卡通形象。使用纯白背景上的干净黑色墨水线条，辅以细腻的素描排线、俏皮的手绘质感，并在周围添加小爱心、闪光和可爱的涂鸦装饰。保持温暖的拥抱、欢乐的家庭联系以及抓拍照片般的视角。卡哇伊漫画风格，极简黑白配色，贴纸包美学，温馨的儿童绘本插画，迷人的速写画，表情生动，圆润柔和的形状，舒适暖心的氛围，高细节线条艺术，可爱的社交媒体头像风格，大师级品质。

descriptions.en: A wholesome prompt to transform real family photos into cute black-and-white hand-drawn chibi illustrations.
descriptions.zh: 一个温馨的提示词，可将真实的家庭照片转换为可爱的黑白手绘 Q 版插画。

cases.author: Taaruk

cases.title: Product Marketing - High-Fashion Editorial Crimson Portrait

titles.en: Product Marketing - High-Fashion Editorial Crimson Portrait
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 高级时尚杂志风格深红色肖像

cases.promptPreview: Using the provided reference image, create an ultra-realistic high-fashion editorial portrait of the same woman against a bold seamless {argument name="background color" default="crimson-red"} studio background. The composition is clean, minimal, and dramatic, inspired by luxury campaigns from Saint Laurent, Vogue, an...

prompts.en:
Using the provided reference image, create an ultra-realistic high-fashion editorial portrait of the same woman against a bold seamless {argument name="background color" default="crimson-red"} studio background. The composition is clean, minimal, and dramatic, inspired by luxury campaigns from Saint Laurent, Vogue, and high-end beauty editorials.

The woman has {argument name="hair style" default="long silky auburn hair styled in soft side-parted waves draped over one shoulder"}, fair porcelain skin with subtle freckles, piercing light-colored eyes, sculpted brows, and bold matte crimson-red lipstick. She wears a {argument name="expression" default="confident, intense expression"} while looking directly into the camera.

She is dressed in an oversized tailored black blazer casually draped over her shoulders, worn over a deep-plunge black outfit with elegant minimalist styling. Both hands gently hold the blazer lapels near her chest, creating a powerful yet refined pose.

The lighting is soft but dramatic, with studio-quality illumination that highlights facial contours and creates subtle shadows while preserving flawless skin texture and luxurious fabric detail. The background remains a smooth, vibrant red gradient with no distractions.
Photographed with a medium-format camera, 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, ultra-sharp focus, cinematic color grading, premium editorial styling, photorealistic skin texture, detailed hair strands, luxury fashion campaign aesthetic, masterpiece quality, 8K resolution.

Style Keywords
high-fashion editorial, luxury studio portrait, crimson background, black blazer aesthetic, Vogue-inspired, Saint Laurent style, minimalist fashion, cinematic lighting, beauty campaign, photorealistic, premium magazine cover, ultra detailed, 8K.

Negative Prompt
low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra limbs, distorted face, asymmetrical eyes, cartoon, anime, CGI, plastic skin, watermark, logo, text, noisy image, oversaturated colors, poorly drawn hands, unrealistic proportions, artifacts, low resolution.
prompts.zh:
使用提供的参考图像，创作一张超写实的高级时尚杂志风格肖像，模特与参考图一致，背景为大胆的无缝 {argument name="background color" default="深红色"} 摄影棚背景。构图简洁、极简且富有戏剧性，灵感源自 Saint Laurent、Vogue 等奢侈品广告及高端美妆杂志大片。

模特拥有 {argument name="hair style" default="长而柔顺的赤褐色秀发，侧分波浪造型垂于一侧肩头"}，白皙如瓷的肌肤上带有淡淡雀斑，浅色双眸深邃锐利，眉形轮廓分明，涂抹着大胆的哑光深红色唇膏。她面带 {argument name="expression" default="自信而强烈的表情"}，直视镜头。

她身穿一件超大廓形剪裁的黑色西装外套，随意披在肩上，内搭深 V 领黑色服饰，造型简约优雅。双手轻轻扶住胸前的西装翻领，姿态既充满力量感又不失精致。

灯光柔和而富有戏剧性，采用摄影棚级布光，突显面部轮廓并营造出微妙的阴影，同时保留了完美的皮肤质感和奢华的面料细节。背景为平滑、鲜艳的红色渐变，没有任何杂乱元素。
使用中画幅相机拍摄，85mm 人像镜头，浅景深，超清晰对焦，电影级调色，高级杂志造型，照片级皮肤质感，发丝细节丰富，奢侈时尚广告美学，大师级品质，8K 分辨率。

风格关键词
高级时尚杂志风格，奢华摄影棚肖像，深红色背景，黑色西装美学，Vogue 灵感，Saint Laurent 风格，极简时尚，电影级灯光，美妆广告，照片级写实，高端杂志封面，超精细，8K。

负面提示词
低质量，模糊，解剖结构错误，多余手指，多余肢体，面部扭曲，双眼不对称，卡通，动漫，CGI，塑料感皮肤，水印，标志，文字，噪点，色彩过饱和，手部绘制拙劣，比例不真实，伪影，低分辨率。

descriptions.en: An ultra-realistic high-fashion editorial portrait of a woman with auburn hair against a bold crimson-red studio background, inspired by Vogue and luxury campaigns.
descriptions.zh: 一张超写实的高级时尚杂志风格肖像，背景为大胆的深红色摄影棚背景，模特拥有一头赤褐色头发，灵感源自 Vogue 和奢侈品广告大片。

cases.promptPreview: Young Asian office worker woman, {argument name="age" default="25 years old"}, with long black hair naturally falling over her shoulders, exquisite and three-dimensional facial features, fair skin, light makeup, and a gentle and quiet temperament. Wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="light gray shirt and a black...

prompts.en: Young Asian office worker woman, {argument name="age" default="25 years old"}, with long black hair naturally falling over her shoulders, exquisite and three-dimensional facial features, fair skin, light makeup, and a gentle and quiet temperament. Wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="light gray shirt and a black long skirt"}, holding a cup of coffee. Standing at a {argument name="location" default="Tokyo street corner"}, with sunlight shining on the exterior walls of the building. The background shows slightly blurred passers-by, bicycles, and roadside greenery. A natural snapshot moment, just stopping to look back at the camera. Real skin texture, sunlight passing through leaves to form dappled shadows. 85mm lens, f1.8, large aperture blur, high-end magazine street shooting quality, MUJI advertising photography style, documentary-grade realism, RAW photo, ultra-realistic environmental atmosphere.
prompts.zh: 年轻的亚洲女性职场人士，{argument name="age" default="25 岁"}，留着黑色长发，自然垂落在肩头，五官精致立体，皮肤白皙，淡妆，气质温柔安静。身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="浅灰色衬衫搭配黑色长裙"}，手拿一杯咖啡。站在 {argument name="location" default="东京街头拐角处"}，阳光照在建筑外墙上。背景中可以看到略微模糊的行人、自行车和路边的绿植。捕捉自然的瞬间，仿佛驻足回眸看向镜头。真实的皮肤质感，阳光透过树叶形成斑驳的阴影。85mm 镜头，f1.8，大光圈虚化，高端杂志街拍质感，MUJI 广告摄影风格，纪录片级写实度，RAW 原片，超逼真的环境氛围。

descriptions.en: A detailed prompt for generating highly realistic portraits of an Asian office worker on a Tokyo street, featuring natural dappled sunlight and MUJI-style aesthetic.
descriptions.zh: 一份详细的提示词，用于生成在东京街头拍摄的极具写实感的亚洲职场人士肖像，呈现自然斑驳的阳光与 MUJI 风格美学。

cases.author: Adam也叫吉米

cases.title: Social Media Post - Sunlit Urban Golden Hour Fashion Portrait

titles.en: Social Media Post - Sunlit Urban Golden Hour Fashion Portrait
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 城市暖阳下的黄金时刻时尚人像

cases.promptPreview: Full-body fashion portrait of a young woman in a {argument name="setting" default="sunlit urban plaza"} during golden hour, casual-chic outfit: {argument name="outfit" default="beige ribbed short-sleeve polo sweater with subtle V-neck and cropped hem, high-waisted cream wide-leg jeans with visible button and pockets, ...

prompts.en: Full-body fashion portrait of a young woman in a {argument name="setting" default="sunlit urban plaza"} during golden hour, casual-chic outfit: {argument name="outfit" default="beige ribbed short-sleeve polo sweater with subtle V-neck and cropped hem, high-waisted cream wide-leg jeans with visible button and pockets, white chunky sneakers, canvas tote bag with bold black graphic print, beige baseball cap"}, long wavy dark brown hair, minimal jewelry (watch and bracelet) and optional sunglasses, holding an iced coffee as a prop; relaxed confident poses — hands in pockets, walking, seated on steps, three-quarter front and back views, gentle natural smile and candid gaze. Warm directional soft sunlight creating long soft shadows and flattering highlights, shallow depth of field with gentle bokeh, high-resolution photorealistic rendering, neutral beige/cream/white color palette, emphasis on knit and denim textures, modern concrete steps, metal railing and greenery in the background, clean editorial lifestyle aesthetic, cinematic film tones, soft contrast and natural skin tones, crisp detail, authentic street-style mood.
prompts.zh: 在 {argument name="setting" default="阳光明媚的城市广场"} 黄金时刻拍摄的年轻女性全身时尚人像，休闲时尚穿搭：{argument name="outfit" default="米色罗纹短袖 Polo 衫，带有精致的 V 领和短款下摆；高腰奶油色阔腿牛仔裤，带有明显的纽扣和口袋；白色厚底运动鞋；带有醒目黑色印花图案的帆布托特包；米色棒球帽"}，深棕色长波浪卷发，佩戴极简首饰（手表和手链）及可选墨镜，手持冰咖啡作为道具；姿态自信放松——双手插兜、行走、坐在台阶上，呈现四分之三正面和背面视角，自然的浅笑和随性的目光。温暖的定向柔光营造出长而柔和的阴影与迷人的高光，浅景深效果带来柔和的虚化，高分辨率超写实渲染，中性米色/奶油色/白色色调，强调针织与牛仔的质感，背景为现代混凝土台阶、金属栏杆和绿植，干净的杂志生活方式审美，电影感色调，柔和的对比度和自然的肤色，细节清晰，充满地道的街头风格氛围。

descriptions.en: A photorealistic fashion portrait of a young woman in an urban setting during golden hour, featuring a casual-chic aesthetic and high-resolution detail.
descriptions.zh: 一张在黄金时刻拍摄的城市背景下年轻女性的超写实时尚人像，展现了休闲时尚的审美和高分辨率细节。

cases.author: Lina

cases.title: Comic / Storyboard - Minimal Japanese Watercolor Illustration

titles.en: Comic / Storyboard - Minimal Japanese Watercolor Illustration
titles.zh: 漫画 / 故事板 - 极简日式水彩插画

cases.promptPreview: A delicate watercolor storybook illustration on textured handmade paper. Large negative space. Soft pastel colors. Minimal composition. A solitary {argument name="subject" default="[SUBJECT]"} interacting with {argument name="object" default="[OBJECT]"}. Small floating flowers, butterflies, petals, and watercolor spla...

prompts.en: A delicate watercolor storybook illustration on textured handmade paper. Large negative space. Soft pastel colors. Minimal composition. A solitary {argument name="subject" default="[SUBJECT]"} interacting with {argument name="object" default="[OBJECT]"}. Small floating flowers, butterflies, petals, and watercolor splashes surrounding the figure. Quiet emotional atmosphere, nostalgic and poetic. Contemporary Japanese watercolor artbook style. Fine ink details, transparent watercolor washes, visible paper texture, gallery-quality illustration. Subject occupies only 20–30% of the canvas. Background mostly blank paper. Soft edges, subtle shadows, elegant handcrafted appearance.
prompts.zh: 一幅在手工纹理纸上绘制的细腻水彩绘本插画。大面积留白。柔和的粉彩色调。极简构图。一个孤独的 {argument name="subject" default="[SUBJECT]"} 正在与 {argument name="object" default="[OBJECT]"} 互动。人物周围环绕着零星漂浮的花朵、蝴蝶、花瓣和水彩溅点。安静的情感氛围，怀旧且富有诗意。当代日式水彩画册风格。精致的墨线细节，透明的水彩渲染，可见的纸张纹理，画廊级插画品质。主体仅占据画布的 20%–30%。背景大部分为留白纸张。边缘柔和，阴影微妙，呈现出优雅的手工质感。

descriptions.en: A poetic, contemporary Japanese storybook illustration with delicate watercolor washes and fine ink details on textured paper.
descriptions.zh: 一幅充满诗意的当代日式绘本插画，在纹理纸张上呈现细腻的水彩渲染与精致的墨线细节。

cases.promptPreview: Ultra-realistic Gen Z-style selfie collage featuring three vertical smartphone flash photos of a young woman with {argument name="hair style" default="long, softly curled black hair"}, luminous glass-like skin, subtle rosy cheeks, glossy peach-toned lips, and fresh natural makeup. She wears a {argument name="top" defa...

prompts.en: Ultra-realistic Gen Z-style selfie collage featuring three vertical smartphone flash photos of a young woman with {argument name="hair style" default="long, softly curled black hair"}, luminous glass-like skin, subtle rosy cheeks, glossy peach-toned lips, and fresh natural makeup. She wears a {argument name="top" default="vintage blue-gray sleeveless Nirvana top"}, a silver chain necklace, and black nail polish with detailed nail art. Each selfie captures a different expression: {argument name="expressions" default="chin resting on hand, playful wink with tongue sticking out, and a warm cheerful smile"}. Bright phone-flash lighting, authentic social media aesthetic, casual candid vibe, highly detailed and photorealistic.
prompts.zh: 超写实的 Z 世代风格自拍拼贴画，包含三张竖构图的智能手机闪光灯自拍照片。照片中的年轻女性拥有 {argument name="hair style" default="黑色长卷发"}，皮肤如玻璃般透亮，带有淡淡的红晕，涂着水润的桃色唇釉，妆容清新自然。她身穿 {argument name="top" default="复古蓝灰色无袖 Nirvana 上衣"}，佩戴银色链条项链，涂着黑色指甲油并配有精致的美甲。每张自拍捕捉了不同的表情：{argument name="expressions" default="托腮、俏皮眨眼吐舌头，以及温暖灿烂的笑容"}。明亮的手机闪光灯照明，地道的社交媒体美学，随性的抓拍感，细节丰富且高度写实。

descriptions.en: An ultra-realistic collage of smartphone flash selfies featuring a young woman in a vintage Nirvana top with a casual social media vibe.
descriptions.zh: 一组超写实的智能手机闪光灯自拍拼贴画，展现了一位身穿复古 Nirvana 上衣的年轻女性，充满随性的社交媒体氛围。

cases.promptPreview: [Reference Image] Use the reference photo while keeping the face completely unchanged and identical to the original subject, Ultra-realistic warm lifestyle beverage magazine cover featuring a {argument name="subject" default="cozy elegant Korean woman"} in a soft {argument name="outfit" default="oversized cream knit s...

prompts.en:
[Reference Image]
Use the reference photo while keeping the face completely unchanged and identical to the original subject, Ultra-realistic warm lifestyle beverage magazine cover featuring a {argument name="subject" default="cozy elegant Korean woman"} in a soft {argument name="outfit" default="oversized cream knit sweater"}, both hands wrapped around a {argument name="prop" default="branded ceramic mug of artisanal coffee with visible latte art and gentle steam rising"}, content peaceful smile, eyes slightly closed in enjoyment. Warm glowing skin, soft natural makeup, rosy cheeks. Loose soft waves. Background: warm rustic café interior with wooden textures, soft morning window light, blurred coffee bags and roasting equipment. "FOOD & WINE" masthead in warm serif typography with brand story callout text. 50mm lens, ultra-detailed steam wisps and latte foam texture, 8K photorealistic cozy lifestyle campaign. Negative: cartoon, blurry, cold lighting, watermark, fake steam CGI.
prompts.zh:
[参考图片]
使用参考照片，同时确保面部完全不变，与原主体保持一致。超写实温馨生活饮品杂志封面，主角为一位 {argument name="subject" default="优雅舒适的韩国女性"}，身穿柔软的 {argument name="outfit" default="米色大廓形针织毛衣"}，双手捧着一个 {argument name="prop" default="带有品牌标识的陶瓷杯，杯中是带有拉花且冒着轻微热气的手工咖啡"}，面带宁静的微笑，双眼微闭，尽情享受。肌肤透出温暖光泽，自然的淡妆，红润的双颊。柔软的波浪卷发。背景：温暖的乡村风格咖啡馆内景，木质纹理，柔和的晨光透过窗户，背景中模糊的咖啡豆袋和烘焙设备。顶部印有“FOOD & WINE”杂志标题，采用温暖的衬线字体，并配有品牌故事的宣传文字。50mm 镜头，超细节的蒸汽丝缕和拿铁奶泡质感，8K 照片级写实温馨生活广告大片。负面提示词：卡通、模糊、冷色调、水印、虚假的 CGI 蒸汽。

descriptions.en: An ultra-realistic lifestyle magazine cover featuring a woman in a cream knit sweater with an artisanal coffee, maintaining facial identity from a reference image.
descriptions.zh: 一张超写实的时尚生活杂志封面，展示了一位身穿米色针织毛衣、手捧手工咖啡的女性，并保持了参考图中的面部特征。

cases.promptPreview: 9:16 vertical, high-precision 3D CG {argument name="character theme" default="oriental fantasy female"} portrait, 3D CG oriental fantasy beauty portrait, anime-style 3D CG character art, semi-realistic 3D character render, close-up from chest up to half-body composition. The subject is a clearly adult young oriental f...

prompts.en:
9:16 vertical, high-precision 3D CG {argument name="character theme" default="oriental fantasy female"} portrait, 3D CG oriental fantasy beauty portrait, anime-style 3D CG character art, semi-realistic 3D character render, close-up from chest up to half-body composition. The subject is a clearly adult young oriental fantasy woman, visual age approx. {argument name="visual age" default="22–28 years old"}, with a cold, noble, mysterious, aloof, and soft temperament, carrying the high-end feel of a black-feathered goddess and oriental fantasy nobility. Not a flat illustration, but a high-completion 3D CG character render with exquisite modeling, realistic materials, cinematic soft lighting, and a premium virtual character poster quality.
Features an exquisite oriental beauty face, a small and soft oval face with clear and smooth bone structure, clean jawline, fair and delicate skin with a cold-white translucent feel and silky smooth skin coloring. Eyes are slender and soft, pupil color a blend of light amber brown and warm gold with transparent glass-like texture and fine highlights, gaze is quiet, cold, and slightly aloof. Long eyelashes, eye makeup is low-saturation warm brown and light pink with a misty smudge. Nose bridge is delicate and straight, lips are soft and refined in low-saturation peach mauve, slightly parted with a restrained, elegant, and somewhat pensive cold beauty.
Hairstyle is {argument name="hairstyle" default="deep black cool-toned fluffy short curly layered hair"}, voluminous and silky, with slight airiness and natural curls. Messy soft bangs and side strands frame the face, with a longer lock of hair trailing at the back. Faint black feather decorative outlines are integrated at the top of the head or behind, reinforcing the mysterious fantasy temperament. Earrings are gorgeous oriental-style pendants with metal bases paired with blue-gold gems and fine dangling ornaments. Hands wear gold rings, fingers long and elegant, with one hand lightly raised near the chin and side of the face in a restrained and noble posture.
Clothing is a high-precision 3D CG oriental fantasy garment, primarily black silk and brocade high-collar robe or modified Chinese-style dress, covered in magnificent oriental embroidery including gold cloud patterns, mythical beast patterns, floral patterns, with cyan and coral pink accents. Collar is exquisite and three-dimensional, with complex embroidery and jewelry details on the chest and shoulders. Fabric has realistic silk reflection, heavy drape, and premium texture. Overall clothing is magnificent, solemn, and mysterious, emphasizing a black-gold color scheme and oriental luxury.
A single or double black wing unfolds behind the character, with clear feather layers and realistic textures, featuring faint cold light and velvet-like quality, acting as a key visual element without obstructing the subject. Background is an oriental fantasy decorative space with golden carved circular frames, ornate screen patterns, light blue-gray landscape vistas, pink cherry blossom branches, and light misty clouds, creating a fusion of classical oriental and dreamlike myth. Background is richly layered but appropriately blurred.
Lighting uses soft cinematic lighting, with a soft light main lamp on the face supplemented by faint warm gold rim light outlining the hair, wing edges, cheeks, and hands. Skin, silk, embroidery, metal rings, earrings, feathers, and golden decorations all feature clear PBR material performance. The overall color palette is dominated by black, gold, cyan, pink, and cold white skin tones. The image is refined, luxurious, ethereal, and tranquil, with high-end collectible 3D CG oriental fantasy character poster quality.
high detail 3D CG render, Unreal Engine quality, Octane render look, cinematic lighting, PBR materials, subsurface scattering skin, realistic hair strands, black feather wings, ornate embroidered robe, oriental fantasy aesthetics, golden decorative frame, cherry blossom background, volumetric light, cinematic depth of field, soft bloom, ultra detailed, polished anime realism, premium virtual character portrait
prompts.zh:
9:16 竖屏，高精度 3D CG {argument name="character theme" default="东方奇幻女性"} 肖像，3D CG 东方奇幻美女肖像，动漫风格 3D CG 角色艺术，半写实 3D 角色渲染，胸部以上至半身构图。主体为一位明显的成年东方奇幻女性，视觉年龄约 {argument name="visual age" default="22–28 岁"}，气质清冷、高贵、神秘、疏离且柔和，带有黑羽女神与东方奇幻贵族的高级感。非扁平插画，而是具有精致建模、写实材质、电影级柔光和高级虚拟角色海报质感的高完成度 3D CG 角色渲染。
拥有精致的东方美人面孔，小巧柔和的鹅蛋脸，骨骼结构清晰流畅，下颌线干净，皮肤白皙细腻，带有冷白通透感和丝滑的肤色。眼睛细长柔和，瞳孔颜色为浅琥珀棕色与暖金色的混合，具有透明玻璃般的质感和细腻的高光，眼神安静、清冷且略带疏离。长睫毛，眼妆为低饱和度暖棕色与浅粉色的雾面晕染。鼻梁精致挺拔，嘴唇柔和精致，呈低饱和度桃紫色，微张，展现出克制、优雅且略带沉思的清冷美感。
发型为 {argument name="hairstyle" default="深黑色冷调蓬松短卷发层次发型"}，发量丰盈且丝滑，带有轻盈感和自然卷度。凌乱柔和的刘海和侧发修饰脸型，后方留有一缕长发。头顶或身后融入了淡淡的黑色羽毛装饰轮廓，强化了神秘的奇幻气质。耳环为华丽的东方风格吊坠，金属底座搭配蓝金宝石和精致的垂坠装饰。手上佩戴金戒指，手指修长优雅，一只手轻抬靠近下巴和脸侧，姿态克制而高贵。
服装为高精度 3D CG 东方奇幻服饰，主要是黑色丝绸和锦缎高领长袍或改良中式礼服，覆盖着华丽的东方刺绣，包括金云纹、神兽纹、花卉纹，并点缀青色和珊瑚粉色。领口精致立体，胸部和肩部有复杂的刺绣和珠宝细节。面料具有写实的丝绸反光、厚重的垂坠感和高级质感。整体服装华丽、庄重且神秘，强调黑金配色和东方奢华感。
角色身后展开单翼或双翼，羽毛层次清晰，纹理写实，带有淡淡的冷光和天鹅绒般的质感，作为关键视觉元素且不遮挡主体。背景为东方奇幻装饰空间，配有金色雕花圆框、华丽的屏风图案、浅蓝灰色山水远景、粉色樱花枝和轻薄的云雾，营造出古典东方与梦幻神话的融合感。背景层次丰富但经过适当的虚化处理。
光影采用电影级柔光，面部有柔光主灯，辅以淡淡的暖金色轮廓光勾勒头发、翅膀边缘、脸颊和手部。皮肤、丝绸、刺绣、金属戒指、耳环、羽毛和金色装饰均具有清晰的 PBR 材质表现。整体色调以黑、金、青、粉和冷白色肤色为主。画面精致、奢华、空灵且宁静，具有高端收藏级 3D CG 东方奇幻角色海报品质。
高细节 3D CG 渲染，虚幻引擎品质，Octane 渲染效果，电影级光影，PBR 材质，次表面散射皮肤，写实发丝，黑羽翅膀，华丽刺绣长袍，东方奇幻美学，金色装饰框，樱花背景，体积光，电影级景深，柔光溢出，超精细，精致动漫写实，高级虚拟角色肖像

descriptions.en: A highly detailed 3D CG prompt for generating an oriental fantasy female character, featuring a 'Raven Goddess' aesthetic with cinematic lighting and intricate embroidery details.
descriptions.zh: 一个高细节的 3D CG 提示词，用于生成东方奇幻女性角色，呈现“鸦神”美学，具有电影级光影和精致的刺绣细节。

cases.author: 李岳

cases.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - Cybernetic Bioluminescent Flower Infographic

titles.en: Infographic / Edu Visual - Cybernetic Bioluminescent Flower Infographic
titles.zh: 信息图 / 教育视觉图 - 赛博生物发光花卉信息图

cases.promptPreview: Cybernetic translucent bioluminescent flower concept infographic, 9:16 vertical version. In the center is a hyper-realistic 3D cyber-flower, suspended in a cold black futuristic laboratory void. Petals and leaves have a translucent frosted glass texture, with subsurface scattering, X-ray transparency, thin-film refrac...

prompts.en: Cybernetic translucent bioluminescent flower concept infographic, 9:16 vertical version. In the center is a hyper-realistic 3D cyber-flower, suspended in a cold black futuristic laboratory void. Petals and leaves have a translucent frosted glass texture, with subsurface scattering, X-ray transparency, thin-film refraction, and microscopic water droplets; internal plant veins are transformed into PCB circuits, optical fibers, luminescent capillaries, and energy fluids. Maintain a real plant structure: 65% organic lifeform, 35% digital circuitry. Adopt a "star-satellite" composition: the central 3D flower occupies about 30%, while the periphery 70% is a high-density 2D HUD information system. 10 independent data modules are accurately arranged at the edge of the screen, strictly aligned to a hidden grid, connected to petals, leaf veins, stems, stamens, and circuit nodes with 0.5pt ultra-fine straight lines and 90-degree mechanical folded lines. Modules embed miniature bar charts, waveforms, spectral curves, contour profiles, topological nodes, and dot matrix scales. Visual style: Hyper-realistic biological X-ray rendering × cold orthogonal HUD interface × futuristic plant experimental archives. Background is an infinite void close to black, with extremely weak digital grain, scan lines, dot matrix grids, and volumetric fog. The subject integrates naturally into the background without a frame, and the peripheral UI adopts hard-edged modular cutting. Avoid ordinary game interfaces, cheap cyberpunk, cartoon textures, and random mechanical parts collage. **Color Theme: {argument name="theme name" default="Tulip"}*** Background Base: {argument name="dark background" default="cold black"}* Translucent Structural Color: {low saturation glass color}* Main Bio-fluorescence: {main color}* Auxiliary Fluorescence: {auxiliary color}* Single Accent Color: {accent color}* Technical Text Color: {text color}Color rules: Background and structural color occupy about 60%, main and auxiliary fluorescence occupy about 30%, and the accent color occupies only 5%-10%. A maximum of two fluorescent colors and one accent color per screen. The accent color is strictly used for stamen energy cores, circuit nodes, key arrows, danger parameters, and data peaks; large-area use and random rainbow gradients are prohibited. Font adopts condensed technical document typography. A super-large pure Chinese bold title is set at the top, about 64px; Pinyin, English, and mixed Chinese-English are prohibited. 10 modules use monospaced subtitles, technical sans-serif body text, and high-density micro-text. Text becomes denser from the center to the edges, does not block the subject, and no garbled characters appear. Subject color mapping: Petals use transparent structural colors, petal edges and leaf veins use the main fluorescent color, internal fine veins and optical fibers use the auxiliary fluorescent color, and PCB intersection nodes and stamen cores only use the accent color. Peripheral HUD brightness must not exceed the central flower. High detail, cinematic lighting, real refraction, volumetric glow, sharp edges, precision layout, print-grade quality, unified composition, extremely high information density. Subject: {argument name="subject" default="tulip"}
prompts.zh: 赛博半透明生物发光花卉概念信息图，9:16 竖屏版本。中心是一朵超写实的 3D 赛博花卉，悬浮在冰冷的黑色未来实验室虚空中。花瓣和叶片呈现半透明磨砂玻璃质感，具备次表面散射、X 射线透明度、薄膜折射和微小水滴效果；植物内部脉络转化为 PCB 电路、光纤、发光毛细血管和能量流体。保持真实的植物结构：65% 有机生命体，35% 数字电路。采用“星-卫星”式构图：中心 3D 花卉约占 30%，外围 70% 为高密度 2D HUD 信息系统。10 个独立数据模块精确排列在屏幕边缘，严格对齐隐藏网格，通过 0.5pt 超细直线和 90 度机械折线连接至花瓣、叶脉、茎干、雄蕊和电路节点。模块内嵌入微型柱状图、波形图、光谱曲线、轮廓剖面、拓扑节点和点阵刻度。视觉风格：超写实生物 X 射线渲染 × 冷峻正交 HUD 界面 × 未来派植物实验档案。背景为接近黑色的无限虚空，带有极弱的数字噪点、扫描线、点阵网格和体积雾。主体自然融入背景，无边框设计，外围 UI 采用硬边模块化切割。避免普通游戏界面、廉价赛博朋克、卡通质感和随意的机械零件拼贴。**配色主题：{argument name="theme name" default="郁金香"}*** 背景基调：{argument name="dark background" default="冷黑色"}* 半透明结构色：{低饱和度玻璃色}* 主要生物荧光：{主色}* 辅助荧光：{辅助色}* 单一强调色：{强调色}* 技术文本颜色：{文本颜色}配色规则：背景和结构色占比约 60%，主、辅荧光色占比约 30%，强调色仅占 5%-10%。每屏最多使用两种荧光色和一种强调色。强调色严格用于雄蕊能量核心、电路节点、关键箭头、危险参数和数据峰值；禁止大面积使用和随机彩虹渐变。字体采用紧凑型技术文档排版。顶部设置一个超大号纯中文粗体标题，约 64px；禁止出现拼音、英文及中英混杂。10 个模块使用等宽字体副标题、技术无衬线正文和高密度微缩文本。文本由中心向边缘密度逐渐增加，不遮挡主体，且无乱码。主体色彩映射：花瓣使用透明结构色，花瓣边缘和叶脉使用主荧光色，内部细脉和光纤使用辅助荧光色，PCB 交汇节点和雄蕊核心仅使用强调色。外围 HUD 亮度不得超过中心花卉。高细节、电影级光效、真实折射、体积光、锐利边缘、精密布局、印刷级质量、统一构图、极高信息密度。主体：{argument name="subject" default="郁金香"}

descriptions.en: A complex prompt for creating futuristic, cybernetic bioluminescent floral infographics with detailed HUD elements and lab-style aesthetics.
descriptions.zh: 一个用于创作未来感、赛博生物发光花卉信息图的复杂提示词，包含精细的 HUD 元素和实验室风格美学。

titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 可爱绘本风手绘插画

prompts.en: Cute whimsical hand-drawn illustration in a {argument name="art style" default="playful kawaii storybook style"}, {argument name="color palette" default="bright pastel color palette"}, clean white background, doodle elements scattered around the scene ({argument name="doodle elements" default="hearts, flowers, stars, clouds, swirls, leaves, sparkles"}), thick soft outlines, flat colors with subtle texture, cozy and cheerful atmosphere, charming cartoon characters with round eyes, rosy cheeks, simplified features, decorative floral accents, colorful objects and storefronts, aesthetic café and lifestyle vibes, highly detailed yet minimal, digital gouache illustration, children’s book aesthetic, sticker-like composition, vibrant composition, adorable and cozy mood, modern cute illustration, Instagram-worthy artwork, high resolution.
prompts.zh: 可爱且充满童趣的手绘插画，采用 {argument name="art style" default="俏皮可爱的绘本风格"}，{argument name="color palette" default="明亮的柔和色调"}，简洁的白色背景，场景周围散布着涂鸦元素（{argument name="doodle elements" default="爱心、花朵、星星、云朵、漩涡、叶子、闪光"}），粗而柔和的轮廓线，平涂色彩并带有细腻纹理，温馨愉悦的氛围，拥有圆眼睛、红脸蛋和简化特征的迷人卡通角色，装饰性的花卉点缀，色彩缤纷的物体和店面，美学咖啡馆与生活方式氛围，高度细节化且极简，数字水粉插画，儿童绘本美学，贴纸般的构图，充满活力的构图，可爱温馨的情绪，现代可爱插画，适合 Instagram 的艺术作品，高分辨率。

descriptions.en: This prompt generates whimsical, hand-drawn illustrations in a charming kawaii storybook style. It produces cozy scenes with pastel colors, soft outlines, and decorative elements like stars and flowers, perfect for character art or aesthetic digital illustrations.
descriptions.zh: 此提示词可生成充满童趣的可爱绘本风手绘插画。它能创作出带有柔和色调、细腻轮廓以及星星、花朵等装饰元素的温馨场景，非常适合角色设计或美学数字插画。
