cases.author: Lariab Fatima‎

cases.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - South Asian Rural Bioscope Documentary

titles.en: Infographic / Edu Visual - South Asian Rural Bioscope Documentary
titles.zh: 信息图 / 教育视觉图 - 南亚乡村西洋镜纪录片

cases.promptPreview: A black-and-white realistic documentary photograph from the old days. A traditional wooden bioscope stands beside a dusty unpaved village road. Four to five poor village children are looking through the small holes of the bioscope with deep curiosity and wonder. Some are wearing simple old clothes, some are bare-chest...

prompts.en:
A black-and-white realistic documentary photograph from the old days. A traditional wooden bioscope stands beside a dusty unpaved village road. Four to five poor village children are looking through the small holes of the bioscope with deep curiosity and wonder. Some are wearing simple old clothes, some are bare-chested, and most are barefoot. Expressions of pure childhood joy, wonder, and fascination are clear on the children's faces.

Behind the bioscope, an elderly rural man is calmly operating the machine. He is dressed in simple traditional attire, with the marks of time on his face. The surroundings depict a simple rural lifestyle, with a dusty path, trees, and the atmosphere of a quiet village.

Natural lighting, soft shadows, high-quality documentary photography, grainy texture of old film, a deeply emotional and nostalgic environment, mid-20th century South Asian rural life, a historical photograph feel, highly realistic, rich in fine detail, photorealistic, high resolution, perfect presentation of depth and reality.
prompts.zh:
一张来自旧时代的黑白写实纪录片照片。一台传统的木制西洋镜矗立在尘土飞扬的乡村土路旁。四五个贫困的乡村儿童正透过西洋镜的小孔向内窥视，眼中充满了好奇与惊叹。他们有的穿着简陋的旧衣，有的赤裸上身，大多数人赤着双脚。孩子们脸上洋溢着纯真的童年喜悦、惊奇与入迷的神情。

在西洋镜后方，一位年长的乡村老人正平静地操作着机器。他身着朴素的传统服饰，脸上刻满了岁月的痕迹。周围环境展现了简朴的乡村生活，有土路、树木以及宁静村庄的氛围。

自然光影，柔和的阴影，高质量纪录片摄影，老胶片的颗粒质感，充满情感与怀旧的环境，20 世纪中叶南亚乡村生活，历史照片质感，高度写实，细节丰富，照片级真实感，高分辨率，完美呈现深度与真实感。

descriptions.en: A nostalgic prompt for a black-and-white documentary-style photograph depicting curious village children gathered around a traditional bioscope in mid-20th century South Asia.
descriptions.zh: 这是一段怀旧风格的提示词，旨在生成一张黑白纪录片风格的照片，描绘 20 世纪中叶南亚地区，好奇的乡村儿童围聚在传统西洋镜旁的场景。

cases.title: Product Marketing - Elegant Model in Cream Armchair

titles.en: Product Marketing - Elegant Model in Cream Armchair
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 奶油色扶手椅上的优雅模特

cases.promptPreview: Create a photorealistic editorial fashion portrait of a {argument name="model age and ethnicity" default="22-year-old Korean woman"} seated elegantly in a modern cream-colored upholstered armchair in a warm luxury apartment interior. She has long straight dark brown hair styled in a high ponytail with a large black ri...

prompts.en: Create a photorealistic editorial fashion portrait of a {argument name="model age and ethnicity" default="22-year-old Korean woman"} seated elegantly in a modern cream-colored upholstered armchair in a warm luxury apartment interior. She has long straight dark brown hair styled in a high ponytail with a large black ribbon bow, pearl drop earrings, manicured nails, and refined model-like posture. Her face is intentionally anonymized with a plain square blur/mosaic block centered over the face. She wears a {argument name="outfit" default="black satin strapless corset with silver floral embroidery, tiny rhinestone details, front hook closures, black lace trim, garter straps, and black fishnet thigh-high stockings with lace tops"}. Pose her sitting slightly angled toward the camera with legs crossed, one arm resting on the chair arm, and the other hand raised near her temple, conveying elegant confidence rather than explicitness. The setting should include exactly 4 prominent background decor elements: a tall arched brass floor lamp on the left, a large framed abstract line-art print behind her, a small round marble side table on the right, and a smoked-glass mushroom table lamp glowing warmly on the table. Use a beige plaster wall, soft cream rug with subtle geometric texture, muted neutral palette, and cozy evening ambient lighting. Shoot in a realistic high-end lifestyle photography style with shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, soft shadows, crisp fabric details, vertical 4:5 composition, waist-to-knees framing with full chair visible, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
prompts.zh: 创作一张照片级写实风格的时尚编辑肖像，主角为一位 {argument name="model age and ethnicity" default="22 岁韩国女性"}，她优雅地坐在现代奶油色软包扶手椅上，背景为温暖的豪华公寓室内。她留着深棕色长直发，扎成高马尾并系着巨大的黑色丝带蝴蝶结，佩戴珍珠吊坠耳环，指甲修剪整齐，姿态宛如专业模特。她的面部经过刻意处理，在脸部中心位置覆盖了一个简单的方形模糊/马赛克块。她身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="黑色缎面抹胸束身衣，带有银色花卉刺绣、细小水钻细节、前扣设计、黑色蕾丝边饰、吊袜带，以及带有蕾丝袜口的黑色渔网大腿袜"}。让她侧身对着镜头坐着，双腿交叠，一只手臂放在椅子的扶手上，另一只手抬起靠近太阳穴，展现出优雅自信而非暴露的气质。场景应包含 4 个显眼的背景装饰元素：左侧一盏高大的拱形黄铜落地灯，身后一幅大型抽象线条艺术画框，右侧一张小型圆形大理石边桌，以及桌上一盏散发着温暖光芒的烟熏玻璃蘑菇台灯。使用米色灰泥墙面、带有微妙几何纹理的柔软奶油色地毯、柔和的中性色调以及舒适的夜间环境光。采用写实的高端生活方式摄影风格，浅景深，自然的肤色，柔和的阴影，清晰的织物细节，垂直 4:5 构图，腰部至膝盖的取景，完整展示椅子，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。

descriptions.en: A photorealistic fashion portrait prompt for creating an elegant adult Korean model seated in a luxury neutral-toned interior.
descriptions.zh: 一个照片级写实风格的时尚肖像提示词，用于创作一位坐在豪华中性色调室内空间中的优雅成年韩国模特。

cases.title: Product Marketing - Couple Lock Screen iPhone Flat Lay

titles.en: Product Marketing - Couple Lock Screen iPhone Flat Lay
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 情侣锁屏 iPhone 平铺摄影

cases.promptPreview: Create an ultra-realistic luxury Apple-style flat lay photograph of exactly two iPhone 15 Pro devices placed side by side on warm beige linen fabric in golden-hour sunlight, with soft diagonal window shadows and realistic phone reflections. The left phone is slightly left of center and the right phone is slightly righ...

prompts.en: Create an ultra-realistic luxury Apple-style flat lay photograph of exactly two iPhone 15 Pro devices placed side by side on warm beige linen fabric in golden-hour sunlight, with soft diagonal window shadows and realistic phone reflections. The left phone is slightly left of center and the right phone is slightly right of center, both upright in portrait orientation with black rounded bezels, titanium edges, Dynamic Island cutouts, lock-screen status icons, flashlight and camera buttons at the bottom, and the white home indicator bar. Both lock screens show the date “Sunday, June 20” and the large time “05:30”; the left carrier label reads {argument name="left carrier label" default="Smart"} and the right carrier label reads {argument name="right carrier label" default="DITO"}. The lock-screen wallpapers form a seamless couple interaction across the two separate screens: on the left screen, a young woman with long brown hair wears a black T-shirt with bold white text {argument name="left shirt text" default="I’M HIS"} followed by a red heart; her arm extends horizontally out of the left phone wallpaper and continues visually across into the right phone, playfully punching or pressing against the young man’s cheek. On the right screen, a young man with tousled dark hair wears a black hoodie with bold white text {argument name="right shirt text" default="I’M HERS"} followed by a red heart, reacting subtly to her playful punch. Include exactly two visible people, exactly two phones, exactly two red heart icons on the shirts, and make the pose align perfectly across the gap between screens so the arm feels like one continuous image. Faces should appear anonymized or softly obscured while preserving realistic skin tones, hair, clothing, and lighting. Use shallow depth of field, crisp 8K photoreal detail, premium smartphone product photography, warm beige and black color palette, no extra devices, no extra text beyond the lock screen and shirt text, no watermark.
prompts.zh: 创作一张超写实的奢华苹果风格平铺摄影照片，展示两部并排摆放在暖米色亚麻布上的 iPhone 15 Pro，背景为黄金时段的阳光，带有柔和的对角线窗影和逼真的手机倒影。左侧手机略微偏左，右侧手机略微偏右，均以竖屏方向放置，带有黑色圆角边框、钛金属边缘、灵动岛（Dynamic Island）切口、锁屏状态图标、底部的闪光灯和相机按钮，以及白色的主屏幕指示条。两部手机的锁屏均显示日期“6 月 20 日，星期日”和醒目的时间“05:30”；左侧运营商标签显示为 {argument name="left carrier label" default="Smart"}，右侧运营商标签显示为 {argument name="right carrier label" default="DITO"}。锁屏壁纸在两块独立的屏幕间形成无缝的情侣互动效果：左侧屏幕上，一位留着棕色长发的年轻女性穿着黑色 T 恤，上面印有醒目的白色文字 {argument name="left shirt text" default="I’M HIS"} 和一个红色爱心；她的手臂从左侧手机壁纸中水平延伸出来，并在视觉上延伸至右侧手机，俏皮地戳向或按压着年轻男性的脸颊。右侧屏幕上，一位留着凌乱深色头发的年轻男性穿着黑色连帽衫，上面印有醒目的白色文字 {argument name="right shirt text" default="I’M HERS"} 和一个红色爱心，对她的俏皮动作做出微妙反应。画面中仅包含两名人物、两部手机、两颗红色爱心图标，并确保姿势在屏幕间隙处完美对齐，使手臂看起来像是一张连续的图像。人物面部应保持匿名或柔和模糊处理，同时保留真实的肤色、发质、衣物纹理和光影效果。采用浅景深效果，呈现 8K 级超高清摄影细节，高端智能手机产品摄影风格，暖米色与黑色调配色，画面中不包含额外设备，除锁屏和 T 恤文字外无其他文字，无水印。

descriptions.en: An ultra-realistic flat lay of two iPhones with matching couple wallpapers interacting across both lock screens.
descriptions.zh: 一张超写实的平铺摄影作品，展示了两部 iPhone，其锁屏壁纸呈现出跨屏幕互动的情侣主题。

cases.promptPreview: Create an 8K ultra-realistic vertical fashion composite of {argument name="character name" default="a young woman"} with {argument name="hair color and style" default="dark-brown wavy hair in a messy loose bun with stray strands"}, fair glowing skin, natural makeup, pink matte lips, and glossy nails. The composition s...

prompts.en: Create an 8K ultra-realistic vertical fashion composite of {argument name="character name" default="a young woman"} with {argument name="hair color and style" default="dark-brown wavy hair in a messy loose bun with stray strands"}, fair glowing skin, natural makeup, pink matte lips, and glossy nails. The composition shows exactly 2 versions of the same woman: 1 large close-up portrait filling the left and center background from chest to top of head, and 1 full-body figure standing in the right foreground. Both faces are intentionally covered by smooth rectangular skin-tone privacy blocks with soft edges, matching the image’s censor-like look. She wears exactly 4 main outfit pieces: an {argument name="shirt color" default="emerald-blue satin button-up shirt"} with collar and open neckline, fitted black ankle-length pants, white platform sneakers, and subtle glossy nails; the full-body figure has one hand in a pants pocket and the other relaxed at her side. Place her on a circular floating wooden platform at the bottom right, with visible planks and dark wet texture. Surround the subject with dynamic transparent blue water splashes and droplets: a large cresting splash behind the full-body figure’s head and shoulders, a sweeping wave across the lower center over the large portrait, and smaller droplets scattered throughout. Use a clean light-blue studio background, crisp commercial lighting, high contrast, realistic fabric texture, sharp water refraction, polished editorial fashion photography, no text, no logos, no extra people.
prompts.zh: 创作一张 8K 超写实垂直时尚合成图，主角为 {argument name="character name" default="一位年轻女性"}，拥有 {argument name="hair color and style" default="深棕色波浪卷发，梳成凌乱的松散发髻，带有几缕碎发"}，白皙透亮的肌肤，自然妆容，粉色哑光唇妆，以及光泽感指甲。构图展示了同一位女性的 2 个版本：1 个大型特写肖像占据左侧及背景中心（从胸部到头顶），以及 1 个全身人像站在右侧前景。两张面部均被平滑的肤色矩形隐私遮挡块刻意遮盖，边缘柔和，呈现出类似审查的视觉效果。她穿着 4 件主要服装：一件 {argument name="shirt color" default="翡翠蓝缎面衬衫"}，带有领子和开放式领口，搭配修身黑色九分裤、白色厚底运动鞋，指甲光泽细腻；全身人像的一只手插在裤兜里，另一只手自然垂在身侧。将她置于右下角的圆形漂浮木质平台上，平台可见木板纹理及深色湿润质感。主体周围环绕着动态的透明蓝色水花和水滴：全身人像的头部和肩部后方有巨大的浪花，画面下方中心处有横跨大特写肖像的翻涌波浪，周围散布着细小的水滴。采用干净的浅蓝色摄影棚背景，清晰的商业灯光，高对比度，逼真的织物纹理，锐利的水体折射，精致的编辑类时尚摄影风格，无文字，无 Logo，无多余人物。

descriptions.en: Creates a vertical ultra-realistic editorial fashion image with a close-up portrait, full-body model, wooden platform, and dramatic blue water splashes.
descriptions.zh: 创作一张垂直的超写实编辑类时尚图像，包含特写肖像、全身模特、木质平台以及极具戏剧性的蓝色水花飞溅效果。

cases.author: Arina Ai

cases.title: Social Media Post - Fisheye Traveler Plaza Shot

titles.en: Social Media Post - Fisheye Traveler Plaza Shot
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 鱼眼镜头旅行广场拍摄

cases.promptPreview: High-end commercial travel photography shot with an extreme 8mm fisheye lens from a worm’s-eye view, camera placed flat on the cobblestone ground in the center of a historic European city plaza. A {argument name="traveler description" default="trendy young female traveler with long brown hair"} steps directly over the...

prompts.en: High-end commercial travel photography shot with an extreme 8mm fisheye lens from a worm’s-eye view, camera placed flat on the cobblestone ground in the center of a historic European city plaza. A {argument name="traveler description" default="trendy young female traveler with long brown hair"} steps directly over the camera, full body visible, face fully visible and looking straight into the lens with an energetic, inviting smile. Her raised sneaker sole dominates the foreground, showing detailed dirt and tread texture; her other foot is planted near the bottom edge. She wears a {argument name="jacket" default="light blue Nike windbreaker with white panels"}, dark jogger pants, pale blue sneakers, earrings, and rings, with one hand reaching down toward the lens for dramatic depth. Surround the subject with a circular ring of tall historic stone buildings, arcades, domes, towers, and a clock tower, all heavily curved by the fisheye perspective into a globe-like frame. The sky fills the center behind her: vivid saturated blue with bright white scattered clouds. Include small pedestrians around the distant plaza edges for scale. Ultra-wide distorted perspective, crisp architectural detail, realistic commercial travel aesthetic, vibrant colors, dynamic adventurous mood, sharp focus, natural daylight, no text, no watermark.
prompts.zh: 采用 8mm 极致鱼眼镜头拍摄的高端商业旅行摄影作品，相机平放在历史悠久的欧洲城市广场中心的鹅卵石地面上。一位 {argument name="traveler description" default="留着棕色长发的时尚年轻女性旅行者"} 直接跨过相机，全身可见，面部清晰可见并直视镜头，带着充满活力、引人入胜的微笑。她抬起的运动鞋鞋底占据了前景，展示出细致的污垢和纹理；她的另一只脚落在画面底部边缘附近。她穿着一件 {argument name="jacket" default="带有白色拼接的浅蓝色 Nike 风衣"}、深色慢跑裤、浅蓝色运动鞋，佩戴着耳环和戒指，一只手向下伸向镜头，营造出强烈的深度感。主体周围环绕着一圈高大的历史石建筑、拱廊、圆顶、塔楼和钟楼，在鱼眼透视下呈现出球状框架。天空填充在她身后的中心位置：色彩鲜艳的蓝色，点缀着明亮的白色云朵。在广场远处的边缘加入少量行人以体现比例感。超广角畸变透视，清晰的建筑细节，写实的商业旅行美学，色彩鲜艳，充满动态冒险氛围，焦点清晰，自然日光，无文字，无水印。

descriptions.en: Creates a dramatic worm’s-eye fisheye travel photo of a stylish traveler stepping over the camera in a historic European plaza.
descriptions.zh: 创作一张极具戏剧性的虫眼视角鱼眼旅行照片，展示一位时尚旅行者在历史悠久的欧洲广场跨过相机的瞬间。

cases.author: Mehwish kiran

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Realistic Beige Pakistani Couple Portrait

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Realistic Beige Pakistani Couple Portrait
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 逼真的米色巴基斯坦情侣肖像

cases.promptPreview: Create a highly realistic vertical indoor studio portrait of a young {argument name="ethnicity" default="Pakistani"} couple wearing coordinated beige traditional formal outfits. The woman stands in front, slightly left of center, with long straight glossy black hair parted near the middle, wearing an elegant beige sar...

prompts.en: Create a highly realistic vertical indoor studio portrait of a young {argument name="ethnicity" default="Pakistani"} couple wearing coordinated beige traditional formal outfits. The woman stands in front, slightly left of center, with long straight glossy black hair parted near the middle, wearing an elegant beige saree covered with intricate gold embroidery, beadwork, sequins, a heavily embellished border, a delicate necklace, bangles, and natural bridal-style styling. The man stands close behind her on the right, slightly taller, wearing a cream-beige embroidered sherwani with a high collar and subtle patterned texture; his arms wrap gently around her waist with both hands visible over the saree. Both face the camera with calm romantic expressions. Use a plain light gray wall background, soft diffused indoor lighting, natural shadows, realistic skin tones, shallow depth of field, premium wedding portrait photography, full upper-body to mid-leg framing, vertical 2:3 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people. The overall mood is intimate, elegant, and polished, with matching neutral beige and gold tones.
prompts.zh: 创作一张高度逼真的竖版室内摄影棚肖像，展示一对穿着配套米色传统礼服的年轻 {argument name="ethnicity" default="巴基斯坦"} 情侣。女性站在画面中心偏左前方，留着中分长直发，光泽感强，身穿优雅的米色纱丽，上面覆盖着精致的金色刺绣、珠饰、亮片，边缘装饰华丽，佩戴精致的项链和手镯，呈现自然的婚礼造型。男性站在她身后右侧，略高一些，身穿奶油米色刺绣 Sherwani，高领设计，带有细腻的纹理；他的双臂轻轻环绕在她的腰间，双手清晰可见。两人面朝镜头，表情平静而浪漫。使用纯浅灰色墙面作为背景，柔和的室内漫射光，自然的阴影，逼真的肤色，浅景深，高端婚礼肖像摄影，取景范围为上半身至大腿中部，竖版 2:3 构图，无文字，无水印，无额外人物。整体氛围亲密、优雅且精致，色调为和谐的中性米色与金色。

descriptions.en: Generates a polished indoor wedding-style portrait of a young couple in matching beige traditional Pakistani outfits.
descriptions.zh: 生成一张精致的室内婚礼风格肖像，展示一对穿着配套米色传统巴基斯坦服装的年轻情侣。

cases.author: Dilshad Hussain

cases.title: Social Media Post - Tiny Woman Hugging Giant Chocolate

titles.en: Social Media Post - Tiny Woman Hugging Giant Chocolate
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 微型女子拥抱巨型巧克力

cases.promptPreview: Create a warm, cozy macro-realistic photograph in a softly lit home kitchen. On a rustic wooden table, show a tiny miniature {argument name="character age and gender" default="20-year-old woman"} standing at doll-like scale, wearing a pastel pink oversized hoodie, white shorts, and pink low-top sneakers, with brown ha...

prompts.en: Create a warm, cozy macro-realistic photograph in a softly lit home kitchen. On a rustic wooden table, show a tiny miniature {argument name="character age and gender" default="20-year-old woman"} standing at doll-like scale, wearing a pastel pink oversized hoodie, white shorts, and pink low-top sneakers, with brown hair in a messy high bun. She is hugging a giant oversized chocolate bar wrapped in glossy red foil with crinkled silver foil at the top; the chocolate has visible square segments and one bitten corner. Pose her joyfully and playfully, standing on one leg with the other leg bent back. A large realistic human hand enters from the upper right, gently pinching and lifting the hood of her hoodie between thumb and forefinger, emphasizing her miniature size. Use shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the tiny woman, chocolate, hand, and wooden tabletop, with a creamy blurred kitchen background containing warm under-cabinet lights, cabinets, countertop objects, and hanging utensils. Lighting should be golden, soft, and cinematic, with natural skin texture on the hand, realistic fabric folds, detailed wood grain, and whimsical scale contrast. Keep the composition square, centered, high-resolution, photorealistic, no text, no logos, no watermark.
prompts.zh: 创作一张温暖、舒适的微距写实摄影作品，场景设定在光线柔和的家庭厨房中。在质朴的木桌上，展示一位玩偶比例的微型 {argument name="character age and gender" default="20 岁女性"}，她穿着淡粉色超大连帽衫、白色短裤和粉色低帮运动鞋，留着棕色凌乱的高丸子头。她正拥抱一块巨大的巧克力棒，巧克力棒包裹在光亮的红色锡纸中，顶部带有褶皱的银色锡纸；巧克力表面有明显的方块纹理，一角有被咬过的痕迹。让她摆出快乐俏皮的姿势，单脚站立，另一条腿向后弯曲。一只巨大的写实人类手从右上角伸入，用拇指和食指轻轻捏住并提起她的连帽衫兜帽，以突显她的微型尺寸。使用浅景深，焦点清晰地对准微型女子、巧克力、手部和木质桌面，背景为奶油般虚化的厨房，包含温暖的橱柜下灯光、橱柜、台面物品和悬挂的厨具。光线应呈现金色、柔和且具有电影质感，展现手部自然的皮肤纹理、逼真的织物褶皱、细腻的木纹以及奇幻的比例对比。保持构图为正方形、居中、高分辨率、写实风格，无文字、无标志、无水印。

descriptions.en: A macro photorealistic scene of a miniature woman on a kitchen table hugging an oversized chocolate bar while a human hand gently lifts her hoodie.
descriptions.zh: 一张微距写实摄影作品，展示了一位站在厨房桌子上的微型女子正拥抱一块超大巧克力棒，一只人类的手正轻轻提起她的连帽衫。

cases.author: Alina Ai

cases.title: Product Marketing - New York Double Exposure Poster

titles.en: Product Marketing - New York Double Exposure Poster
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 纽约双重曝光海报

cases.promptPreview: Goal: Create a cinematic commercial double-exposure city poster for {argument name="city name" default="NEW YORK"}, featuring a {argument name="subject" default="handsome adult male urban athlete"} as the dominant foreground figure. Canvas: Vertical poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, high-resolution photorealistic advertising ...

prompts.en:
Goal: Create a cinematic commercial double-exposure city poster for {argument name="city name" default="NEW YORK"}, featuring a {argument name="subject" default="handsome adult male urban athlete"} as the dominant foreground figure.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, high-resolution photorealistic advertising style, warm golden-hour color grade, dramatic contrast, sharp detail, no border or watermark.

Composition: Center the upper body of the male subject from chest to top of hair, facing slightly to the viewer’s right. His face is mostly hidden by a plain opaque rectangular block in warm dark brown, covering the central face area while leaving curly dark hair, ear, neck, shoulders, and shirt visible. Place him against a glowing Manhattan skyline at sunset, with the Empire State Building clearly visible on the left and One World Trade Center visible in the right background. Use sun flare and hazy orange clouds behind the buildings.

Double exposure effect: Blend a detailed New York city scene into the subject’s beige crewneck shirt and torso. The torso overlay must include exactly 5 major visible urban elements: 1) the Brooklyn Bridge spanning across the chest, 2) dense Manhattan skyscrapers behind the bridge, 3) an elevated subway train running toward the viewer near the lower center-right, 4) yellow taxis and traffic on a wet city street at the lower left, and 5) glowing shopfronts and building facades along both sides of the lower street. Make the city overlay feel naturally integrated into the fabric, with transparent edges and warm reflections.

Typography: At the bottom, add a huge bold condensed distressed uppercase title reading {argument name="headline text" default="NEW YORK"} in off-white, spanning nearly the full width. Beneath it, add a smaller widely spaced uppercase subtitle reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="BUILT FOR THE RUSH"} in warm golden yellow. Keep the typography centered and poster-like, with the title partially overlapping the lower city scene.

Visual style: Commercial sports-lifestyle poster, gritty urban energy, cinematic realism, golden sunset lighting, wet asphalt reflections, high dynamic range, layered double exposure, premium travel campaign mood, strong depth, crisp architectural details, dramatic but believable lighting.

Constraints: Use only one foreground person, exactly one large city title and one subtitle, no extra logos, no additional text, no visible brand marks, no cartoon styling, no futuristic elements, no duplicated faces.
prompts.zh:
目标：为 {argument name="city name" default="NEW YORK"} 创作一张电影质感的商业双重曝光城市海报，以 {argument name="subject" default="帅气的成年男性城市运动员"} 作为前景主体。

画布：竖版海报，2:3 纵横比，高分辨率照片级广告风格，温暖的黄金时刻色调，戏剧性对比，细节锐利，无边框或水印。

构图：将男性主体从胸部到头顶的上半身置于中心，面部略微朝向观众右侧。他的面部大部分被一块暖深棕色的纯色不透明矩形遮挡，遮住面部中心区域，同时露出卷曲的深色头发、耳朵、颈部、肩膀和衬衫。将他置于夕阳下发光的曼哈顿天际线背景前，左侧清晰可见帝国大厦，右侧背景可见世界贸易中心一号大楼。在建筑物后方使用太阳耀斑和朦胧的橙色云彩。

双重曝光效果：将细节丰富的纽约城市场景融合进主体的米色圆领衫和躯干中。躯干叠加层必须包含 5 个主要的可见城市元素：1) 横跨胸前的布鲁克林大桥，2) 大桥后方密集的曼哈顿摩天大楼，3) 在右下方朝观众驶来的高架地铁列车，4) 左下方潮湿城市街道上的黄色出租车和车流，以及 5) 下方街道两侧发光的店面和建筑立面。让城市叠加层与衣物自然融合，边缘透明并带有温暖的反射。

排版：在底部添加一个巨大的粗体压缩做旧大写标题，内容为 {argument name="headline text" default="NEW YORK"}，颜色为灰白色，宽度几乎横跨整个海报。在标题下方，添加一个较小的、字间距较宽的大写副标题，内容为 {argument name="subtitle text" default="BUILT FOR THE RUSH"}，颜色为暖金黄色。保持排版居中且具有海报感，标题部分覆盖下方的城市场景。

视觉风格：商业运动生活方式海报，硬朗的城市能量，电影级写实感，金色夕阳照明，湿沥青反射，高动态范围，分层双重曝光，高端旅游宣传氛围，强烈的深度感，清晰的建筑细节，戏剧性但真实的光影。

限制：仅使用一名前景人物，仅限一个大型城市标题和一个副标题，无额外 Logo，无附加文字，无可见品牌标识，无卡通风格，无未来主义元素，无重复面孔。

descriptions.en: A cinematic urban athlete poster blending a male portrait with Manhattan landmarks, traffic, subway tracks, and bold city typography for commercial travel or sports branding.
descriptions.zh: 一张电影质感的城市运动员海报，将男性肖像与曼哈顿地标、车流、地铁轨道及醒目的城市排版融为一体，适用于商业旅游或体育品牌推广。

cases.author: Eric Kang - Vogue AI

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Nighttime Doodle Flash Selfie

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Nighttime Doodle Flash Selfie
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 夜间涂鸦闪光灯自拍

cases.promptPreview: Create a vertical smartphone flash selfie at night titled {argument name="concept title" default="Nighttime Doodle Flash Selfie"}: an adult East Asian woman with {argument name="hairstyle" default="messy short black hair"} taking an exaggerated close-up selfie in a busy outdoor restaurant or rooftop patio at night, ci...

prompts.en: Create a vertical smartphone flash selfie at night titled {argument name="concept title" default="Nighttime Doodle Flash Selfie"}: an adult East Asian woman with {argument name="hairstyle" default="messy short black hair"} taking an exaggerated close-up selfie in a busy outdoor restaurant or rooftop patio at night, city skyline lights and warm string lights in the background. The camera is ultra wide and held low/forward so one blue sleeve fills the lower-left foreground, creating a dynamic distorted arm perspective. She wears a bright cobalt-blue windbreaker jacket with shiny crinkled fabric and a black zipper. Her face is intentionally anonymized by a centered soft rectangular blur/mosaic block, but her black hair remains visible. Pose her with one hand raised beside her cheek in a playful claw gesture. Use harsh direct phone-flash lighting on the jacket and hand, with darker ambient background, candid chaotic energy, high contrast, documentary selfie realism. Add bold hand-drawn doodles layered over the photo in rough chalk/paint-marker style, mostly white with electric blue, yellow, green, black, and orange accents. Include exactly 15 major doodle elements: 1 huge white word "RAWR!" at the top left with a sweeping underline, 2 a white star near the top center, 3 a cloud speech bubble at the top right saying "CURRENT" in white and "MOOD" in blue with a blue underline, 4 a thick white arrow pointing down from that bubble toward the subject, 5 simple white cat ears drawn on top of her hair, 6 a small white crown above her head, 7 three white whisker lines on the right side of her face area, 8 a blue scribbled heart on the left with white radiating lines, 9 a large poster-like label on the lower-left sleeve saying "NOT" in black on an off-white paint patch and "NORMAL" in black over a neon-green brushstroke, 10 a blue lightning squiggle near the left lower background, 11 a white arrow rising from the bottom center toward the sleeve text, 12 a curved white arrow near the lower middle pointing toward the cartoon creature, 13 a green cartoon dinosaur/kaiju at the lower right with white dorsal spikes, angry eyes, open mouth, sharp teeth, and orange-red fire breath, 14 a white comic burst/hash mark beside the creature, 15 scattered hand-drawn stars: exactly 9 total around the frame, mixing white and yellow, including two large yellow stars on the left and right edges. Keep the doodles energetic and imperfect with visible brush texture, overlapping the photograph naturally. Use {argument name="jacket color" default="bright cobalt blue"} as the dominant color, with the blue doodle accents matching it. Composition should feel chaotic, rebellious, cute-monster themed, and social-media-ready, 9:16 vertical crop, no watermark, no extra readable text beyond "RAWR!", "CURRENT MOOD", and "NOT NORMAL".
prompts.zh: 创作一张标题为 {argument name="concept title" default="Nighttime Doodle Flash Selfie"} 的竖版手机闪光灯夜间自拍：一位东亚成年女性，留着 {argument name="hairstyle" default="凌乱的黑色短发"}，在繁忙的户外餐厅或屋顶露台拍摄夸张的近距离自拍，背景是城市天际线灯光和温暖的串灯。镜头采用超广角并以低位/前伸角度拍摄，一只蓝色袖子占据左下角前景，营造出动态的畸变手臂视角。她穿着一件亮钴蓝色的防风夹克，面料带有光泽且有褶皱，配有黑色拉链。她的面部被居中的柔和矩形模糊/马赛克块刻意遮挡，但黑色头发清晰可见。让她摆出单手举在脸颊旁、做出俏皮爪子姿势的造型。使用强烈的手机直闪灯光照射夹克和手部，背景环境光较暗，呈现出随性混乱的能量感、高对比度以及纪实自拍的真实感。在照片上叠加粗犷的粉笔/油漆笔风格的手绘涂鸦，以白色为主，辅以电光蓝、黄、绿、黑和橙色点缀。包含 15 个主要的涂鸦元素：1 左上角一个巨大的白色单词 "RAWR!" 并带有扫尾下划线，2 顶部中心附近一颗白色星星，3 右上角一个云朵对话气泡，写着白色的 "CURRENT" 和蓝色的 "MOOD" 并带有蓝色下划线，4 从气泡指向主体的一支粗白色箭头，5 她头发上方画着的简单白色猫耳，6 她头顶上方的一个小白色皇冠，7 她脸部右侧的三条白色胡须线，8 左侧一个带有白色放射线的蓝色涂鸦爱心，9 左下角袖子上一个类似海报的标签，写着米白色油漆块上的黑色 "NOT" 和霓虹绿笔触上的黑色 "NORMAL"，10 左下背景处一个蓝色闪电涂鸦，11 从底部中心指向袖子文字的一支白色箭头，12 下方中间指向卡通生物的一支弯曲白色箭头，13 右下角一只绿色的卡通恐龙/怪兽，带有白色背刺、愤怒的眼睛、张开的嘴、尖锐的牙齿和橙红色火焰，14 生物旁边的一个白色漫画爆炸/阴影标记，15 散布的手绘星星：画面周围总共 9 颗，混合白色和黄色，包括左右边缘的两颗大黄色星星。保持涂鸦的活力与不完美感，笔触纹理清晰，自然地覆盖在照片上。使用 {argument name="jacket color" default="亮钴蓝色"} 作为主色调，并使蓝色涂鸦装饰与之呼应。构图应呈现出混乱、叛逆、可爱怪兽主题且适合社交媒体的风格，采用 9:16 竖屏比例，无水印，除 "RAWR!"、"CURRENT MOOD" 和 "NOT NORMAL" 外，不包含其他可读文字。

descriptions.en: Generates a chaotic vertical night flash selfie with playful monster-themed doodles and bold social-media lettering.
descriptions.zh: 生成一张充满混乱感的竖版夜间闪光灯自拍，配有俏皮的怪兽主题涂鸦和醒目的社交媒体风格文字。

cases.author: Eric Kang - Vogue AI

cases.title: Social Media Post - Rainy Cyberpunk Leather Fashion Shoot

titles.en: Social Media Post - Rainy Cyberpunk Leather Fashion Shoot
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 雨中赛博朋克皮革时尚大片

cases.promptPreview: Create a cinematic full-body fashion editorial photo of an {argument name="subject" default="adult woman"} dancing dramatically in the middle of a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, arms stretched wide like a runway pose, one leg crossed forward and lifted onto tiptoe. She wears a glossy {argument name="coat color ...

prompts.en: Create a cinematic full-body fashion editorial photo of an {argument name="subject" default="adult woman"} dancing dramatically in the middle of a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, arms stretched wide like a runway pose, one leg crossed forward and lifted onto tiptoe. She wears a glossy {argument name="coat color and material" default="black leather"} long trench coat styled like a revealing high-fashion wrap dress with asymmetric cutouts, deep neckline, high slit, belted waist, and wind-swept hem, paired with {argument name="shoes" default="leopard-print stiletto heels"}. Her face is intentionally anonymized with a soft rectangular blur while keeping the body, outfit, and environment sharply detailed. The setting is a neon-lit futuristic downtown with wet reflective asphalt, falling rain, motion-blurred pink, cyan, teal, and yellow light trails, glowing billboards, and a sleek dark car directly behind her with headlights on and rain droplets on the windshield. Use a low-angle 35mm fashion-photography perspective, high contrast, glossy reflections, dramatic rim lighting, shallow depth of field, vibrant magenta and turquoise color grading, ultra-realistic skin and leather texture, dynamic motion, no readable text, no watermark.
prompts.zh: 创作一张电影感十足的全身时尚编辑照片，展示一位 {argument name="subject" default="成年女性"} 在夜晚雨中的赛博朋克城市街道中央进行戏剧性的舞蹈动作，双臂如 T 台走秀般向两侧伸展，一条腿交叉向前并踮起脚尖。她身穿一件光泽感十足的 {argument name="coat color and material" default="黑色皮革"} 长款风衣，设计风格如同大胆的高级时装裹身裙，带有不对称镂空、深 V 领、高开叉、束腰带以及被风吹起的下摆，搭配 {argument name="shoes" default="豹纹细高跟鞋"}。她的面部通过柔和的矩形模糊处理进行匿名化，同时保持身体、服装和环境的细节清晰锐利。场景设定在霓虹闪烁的未来主义市中心，地面是潮湿且具有反射感的沥青路面，伴有降雨、粉色、青色、蓝绿色和黄色的动态模糊光轨、发光的广告牌，以及她身后一辆开启车灯、挡风玻璃上布满雨滴的流线型深色汽车。采用低角度 35mm 时尚摄影视角，高对比度，光泽反射，戏剧性的轮廓光，浅景深，充满活力的洋红色和绿松石色调，超写实的皮肤和皮革质感，动态感，无可见文字，无水印。

descriptions.en: A cinematic neon fashion photograph of an anonymized model posing in a rainy cyberpunk street, useful for edgy editorial or nightlife visuals.
descriptions.zh: 一张电影感十足的霓虹时尚摄影作品，展示了一位面部模糊的模特在雨中赛博朋克街道上的姿态，适用于前卫的编辑内容或夜生活视觉素材。

cases.author: ddtoys2016

cases.title: Social Media Post - Soft Sunlit Anime Bedroom Selfie

titles.en: Social Media Post - Soft Sunlit Anime Bedroom Selfie
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 柔和阳光下的动漫风卧室自拍

cases.promptPreview: Create a soft, sunlit mirror-selfie fashion portrait of a young woman named {argument name="character name" default="the girl next door"} standing in a cozy bedroom covered with anime posters. She has long, slightly messy {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair and a slim build, holding a silver smartphone i...

prompts.en: Create a soft, sunlit mirror-selfie fashion portrait of a young woman named {argument name="character name" default="the girl next door"} standing in a cozy bedroom covered with anime posters. She has long, slightly messy {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair and a slim build, holding a silver smartphone in front of her face so the face is mostly hidden by the phone and a soft rectangular privacy blur. She wears a cropped anime-face graphic T-shirt, a low-waisted black-and-gray plaid micro pleated skirt, and white thigh-high socks. Use warm late-afternoon sunlight entering from the left, creating strong rectangular highlights, deep soft shadows, and a distinct shadow of her body on the wall to the right. The background is an off-white wall and door corner with exactly 9 visible anime wall decorations: 1 large poster on the far left edge, 1 smaller vertical poster below it, 1 small dark poster near the doorframe, 1 large red-and-white poster above her head, 1 dark action poster behind her head, 1 pink poster at the upper right, 1 newspaper-style manga print at mid-right, 1 large blue soccer-anime poster at lower right, and 1 partially visible colorful poster at lower left. Add elegant editorial text overlay in the upper left reading {argument name="headline text" default="LOVED SOFTLY"} in large cream serif capitals, with a small hand-drawn heart and the cursive line {argument name="small quote" default="you look like home"} beneath it. Add a tiny poetic caption in the lower left reading {argument name="bottom caption" default="the way you exist changes everything you're not just in the story you are the story"}, plus a small heart below. Overall style: realistic gpt-image-2 photorealism with gentle feminine mood, nostalgic bedroom aesthetic, natural skin texture, no plastic beauty retouching, soft grain, muted warm colors, vertical 3:4 composition, intimate snapshot framing, not overly glamorous.
prompts.zh: 创作一张柔和阳光下的镜面自拍时尚肖像，主角是一位名为 {argument name="character name" default="邻家女孩"} 的年轻女性，她站在一间贴满动漫海报的温馨卧室里。她留着长而略显凌乱的 {argument name="hair color" default="黑色"} 头发，身材苗条，手中拿着一部银色智能手机挡在脸前，大部分面部被手机和柔和的矩形隐私模糊效果遮挡。她身穿一件印有动漫头像的短款 T 恤，搭配低腰黑灰格纹百褶超短裙和白色过膝袜。利用从左侧射入的温暖午后阳光，营造出强烈的矩形高光、深邃柔和的阴影，以及她投射在右侧墙壁上的清晰身体轮廓。背景为米白色的墙壁和门角，墙上精确分布着 9 张动漫装饰：最左侧边缘 1 张大尺寸海报，其下方 1 张较小的竖版海报，门框附近 1 张深色小海报，头顶上方 1 张红白配色大海报，脑后 1 张深色动作类海报，右上角 1 张粉色海报，中右侧 1 张报纸风格的漫画印刷品，右下角 1 张大型蓝色足球动漫海报，以及左下角 1 张部分可见的彩色海报。在左上角添加优雅的杂志风文字叠加，使用大号奶油色衬线大写字母书写 {argument name="headline text" default="LOVED SOFTLY"}，下方配有一个手绘小爱心和草书短句 {argument name="small quote" default="you look like home"}。在左下角添加一段简短的诗意说明文字 {argument name="bottom caption" default="the way you exist changes everything you're not just in the story you are the story"}，并在下方加上一个小爱心。整体风格：逼真的 gpt-image-2 照片级真实感，带有温柔的女性化氛围、怀旧的卧室美学、自然的皮肤纹理，无塑料感的美颜修饰，带有柔和的颗粒感，色调为柔和的暖色，采用 3:4 竖构图，亲密的快照式取景，不过分华丽。

descriptions.en: Generates a warm editorial mirror-selfie portrait in an anime-poster bedroom with soft sunlight and romantic text overlays.
descriptions.zh: 生成一张温暖的杂志风镜面自拍肖像，背景为贴满动漫海报的卧室，配有柔和阳光和浪漫的文字叠加。

cases.title: Social Media Post - Claustrophobic Flash Snapshot

titles.en: Social Media Post - Claustrophobic Flash Snapshot
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 幽闭恐惧闪光快照

cases.promptPreview: Create a square, flash-lit analog snapshot of a young girl with {argument name="face censor style" default="a solid pixelated blur square covering her face"} standing sideways in an extremely narrow gap between a pale turquoise metal door on the left and a smooth light gray-white wall on the right. The composition sho...

prompts.en: Create a square, flash-lit analog snapshot of a young girl with {argument name="face censor style" default="a solid pixelated blur square covering her face"} standing sideways in an extremely narrow gap between a pale turquoise metal door on the left and a smooth light gray-white wall on the right. The composition should feel cramped and slightly unsettling, as if photographed in a tight corridor or behind a door, with the subject squeezed into the dark vertical space. She has dark shoulder-length hair mostly in shadow, visible from head to mid-thigh, one arm hanging straight down, wearing {argument name="outfit" default="a short-sleeved white blouse with tiny blue floral print and a light blue plaid skirt"}. The left side shows an old mint-green metal door or gate with rust stains, chipped paint, a vertical seam, and a white cylindrical latch or hinge fixture near the upper left; the right side is dominated by a close wall surface with soft texture and bluish shadows. Use harsh direct camera flash, cool faded colors, grainy disposable-camera realism, slight vignetting, imperfect focus, dark background behind the subject, and a claustrophobic documentary snapshot mood. No extra people, no text, no watermark.
prompts.zh: 创作一张方形、闪光灯照明的胶片快照，画面中是一个年轻女孩，{argument name="face censor style" default="脸部被一个实心像素化模糊方块遮挡"}，侧身站在左侧浅青色金属门与右侧光滑浅灰白色墙壁之间极度狭窄的缝隙中。构图应给人以局促且略显不安的感觉，仿佛是在狭窄的走廊或门后拍摄，主体被挤压在黑暗的垂直空间里。她留着深色齐肩短发，大部分隐没在阴影中，画面可见范围从头部到大腿中部，一只手臂自然下垂，身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="一件带有细小蓝色碎花图案的短袖白衬衫和一件浅蓝色格子裙"}。左侧是一扇带有锈迹、油漆剥落、垂直接缝以及左上角有一个白色圆柱形门闩或铰链装置的旧薄荷绿金属门或大门；右侧则是一面质感柔和、带有蓝色阴影的墙面。使用强烈的直射相机闪光灯、冷色调褪色效果、一次性相机的颗粒真实感、轻微的暗角、不完美的对焦，主体背景黑暗，营造出一种幽闭恐惧的纪录片快照氛围。画面中无其他人物，无文字，无水印。

descriptions.en: Generates a grainy analog-style photo of a child squeezed in a narrow space between a door and wall for eerie documentary realism.
descriptions.zh: 生成一张颗粒感十足的胶片风格照片，展现一个孩子被挤在门与墙之间的狭窄缝隙中，营造出诡异的纪录片真实感。

cases.author: シオナイ

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Cozy Bedside Portrait With Face Censor

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Cozy Bedside Portrait With Face Censor
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 带遮挡效果的温馨床头肖像

cases.promptPreview: Create a realistic vertical portrait photo of {argument name="subject" default="a young adult woman"} lying on her side in bed at night, half tucked against a large white pillow, wearing a simple beige ribbed tank top or sleep camisole. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown hair"} falling loosely aro...

prompts.en: Create a realistic vertical portrait photo of {argument name="subject" default="a young adult woman"} lying on her side in bed at night, half tucked against a large white pillow, wearing a simple beige ribbed tank top or sleep camisole. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown hair"} falling loosely around her shoulders, with one hand resting near her cheek and the other arm bent across the pillow in a sleepy, intimate pose. Her face should be deliberately covered by a solid opaque rectangular censor block in {argument name="censor block color" default="warm medium brown"}, centered over the face. The room is dim and cozy, lit by one visible warm bedside lamp on the right edge of the frame, casting soft golden light across white bedding and gentle shadows on dark curtains in the background. Use shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, soft low-light photography, warm cinematic tones, a quiet bedtime mood, vertical 2:3 composition, close framing from upper torso to pillow, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
prompts.zh: 创作一张写实的竖构图肖像照片，画面主体为 {argument name="subject" default="一位年轻女性"} 在夜晚侧卧于床上，半身倚靠在一个大白枕头上，身穿一件简约的米色罗纹背心或睡衣吊带。她有着 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色的头发"}，发丝自然地垂落在肩头，一只手靠近脸颊，另一只手臂弯曲搭在枕头上，呈现出一种困倦而亲密的姿态。她的面部应被一个位于正中央的实心不透明矩形遮挡块刻意遮住，遮挡块颜色为 {argument name="censor block color" default="暖中棕色"}。房间光线昏暗且温馨，画面右侧边缘有一盏可见的暖色床头灯，将柔和的金色光芒投射在白色床品上，并在背景的深色窗帘上投下柔和的阴影。采用浅景深、自然的皮肤纹理、柔和的低光摄影风格、温暖的电影色调、宁静的睡前氛围、2:3 竖构图，取景范围为从上半身到枕头的近景，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。

descriptions.en: Generates a warm low-light bedroom portrait of a sleepy woman lying on a pillow with her face covered by a rectangular censor block.
descriptions.zh: 生成一张温暖的低光卧室肖像，画面中一位困倦的女性躺在枕头上，面部被矩形遮挡块覆盖。

cases.author: ゆーじ/AI生成見習い

cases.title: Product Marketing - Street Football Collage Poster

titles.en: Product Marketing - Street Football Collage Poster
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 街头足球拼贴海报

cases.promptPreview: Create a high-resolution vertical 4:5 street football collage poster featuring a full-body young woman as the central subject, walking casually toward the viewer. She has long wavy dark brown hair and wears a gray baseball cap with red-and-white embroidered text reading {argument name="cap text" default="Orlando"}, a ...

prompts.en: Create a high-resolution vertical 4:5 street football collage poster featuring a full-body young woman as the central subject, walking casually toward the viewer. She has long wavy dark brown hair and wears a gray baseball cap with red-and-white embroidered text reading {argument name="cap text" default="Orlando"}, a yellow Brazil-inspired soccer jersey with green trim and a large green {argument name="jersey number" default="10"} on the chest, loose black track pants with thin white side stripes, and clean white sneakers. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur for anonymity, while keeping the pose, hair, outfit, and silhouette natural. Place her on a rough torn-paper white cutout edge, layered over an energetic grunge collage background in Brazil colors: mustard yellow paper texture, royal blue and green torn paper shards, black brush streaks, halftone dots, screen-print grids, paint smears, scratches, distressed ink, and concrete texture on the lower right. Include exactly 5 star graphics: 1 large green star near the upper right, 1 small green star left of the subject near the shoulder area, 1 blue star on the left side, 1 blue star near the right middle, and 1 green star near the lower right. Add bold condensed black editorial typography: top left text reads {argument name="main headline" default="STREET FOOTBALL"} with smaller text underneath reading {argument name="tagline" default="PLAY WITH SOUL"}; right edge has vertical text reading {argument name="side label" default="CITY ICON"}; lower left has a large hand-painted green “10” and stacked black text “PLAY WITH SOUL” with tiny decorative star and line marks beneath. Make the composition feel like a World Cup streetwear fashion poster, with paper collage layers, gritty urban sports energy, high contrast, realistic clothing folds, and no glossy plastic look.
prompts.zh: 创作一张高分辨率的 4:5 竖版街头足球拼贴海报，以一名全身年轻女性为中心主体，她正随意地向观众走来。她留着深棕色长波浪卷发，戴着一顶灰色棒球帽，帽上绣有红白相间的文字 {argument name="cap text" default="Orlando"}，身穿一件黄色的巴西风格足球衫，配有绿色饰边，胸前印有巨大的绿色数字 {argument name="jersey number" default="10"}，下身穿着宽松的黑色运动裤，侧面带有细白条纹，脚蹬干净的白色运动鞋。她的面部特意用柔和的矩形模糊处理以保持匿名，同时保留自然的姿态、发型、服装和轮廓。将她置于粗糙的撕纸白色剪裁边缘上，叠加在充满活力的垃圾摇滚风格拼贴背景之上，背景采用巴西配色：芥末黄纸张质感、宝蓝色和绿色的撕纸碎片、黑色笔触、半色调圆点、丝网印刷网格、油漆涂抹、划痕、做旧墨迹以及右下角的混凝土纹理。包含 5 个星形图形：右上角附近 1 个大绿星，主体左侧肩部区域附近 1 个小绿星，左侧 1 个蓝星，右侧中部附近 1 个蓝星，以及右下角附近 1 个绿星。添加粗体压缩的黑色编辑排版：左上角文字为 {argument name="main headline" default="STREET FOOTBALL"}，下方附带较小的文字 {argument name="tagline" default="PLAY WITH SOUL"}；右侧边缘有垂直文字 {argument name="side label" default="CITY ICON"}；左下角有一个手绘的大号绿色“10”以及堆叠的黑色文字“PLAY WITH SOUL”，下方带有细小的装饰性星号和线条标记。整体构图呈现出世界杯街头时尚海报的质感，融合纸张拼贴层、粗犷的城市运动活力、高对比度、逼真的服装褶皱，且避免任何光亮的塑料感。

descriptions.en: A vertical Brazil-inspired street football fashion poster with torn-paper collage textures, bold typography, and a central anonymous soccer-styled subject.
descriptions.zh: 一张受巴西文化启发的竖版街头足球时尚海报，采用撕纸拼贴质感、粗体排版，中心人物为匿名足球风格形象。

cases.author: serein

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Morning Stretch Bedroom Portrait

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Morning Stretch Bedroom Portrait
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 清晨伸展卧室肖像

cases.promptPreview: Create a vertical photorealistic morning lifestyle portrait of an adult {argument name="character ethnicity" default="Japanese"} woman sitting on a bed in a bright bedroom, framed from the upper torso to the top of the head. She has {argument name="hair color" default="medium chestnut brown"} shoulder-length slightly ...

prompts.en: Create a vertical photorealistic morning lifestyle portrait of an adult {argument name="character ethnicity" default="Japanese"} woman sitting on a bed in a bright bedroom, framed from the upper torso to the top of the head. She has {argument name="hair color" default="medium chestnut brown"} shoulder-length slightly messy wavy hair, and is wearing a simple {argument name="top color" default="white"} ribbed tank top. Pose her stretching sleepily with both arms raised and bent across her face: the left forearm crosses horizontally in front of her eyes, the right arm is lifted to the side with the hand near her hair, fingers relaxed and natural. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque square censor block in a warm brown skin-tone gradient, covering the facial features while leaving hair, arms, neck, and clothing visible. The setting is a soft sunlit bedroom with white bedding in the lower foreground, a bright overexposed window on the upper left, pale curtains on the right, and warm natural backlighting that creates gentle highlights in the hair. Use a realistic camera look with shallow depth of field, soft skin texture, natural proportions, cozy morning atmosphere, clean composition, no text, no watermark, and no extra people.
prompts.zh: 创作一张竖版逼真的清晨生活方式肖像，画面中一位 {argument name="character ethnicity" default="日本"} 成年女性坐在明亮卧室的床上，构图范围从上半身到头部。她留着 {argument name="hair color" default="中栗棕色"} 的齐肩微乱波浪卷发，穿着一件简单的 {argument name="top color" default="白色"} 罗纹背心。让她摆出慵懒伸展的姿势，双臂抬起并弯曲遮住面部：左前臂水平横在双眼前，右臂向侧面抬起，手靠近头发，手指放松且自然。她的面部被一个位于中心的不透明方形遮挡块刻意隐藏，遮挡块采用暖棕色肤色渐变，在遮住面部特征的同时，露出头发、手臂、颈部和衣物。场景设定为一个柔和的阳光卧室，前景下方为白色床品，左上方为明亮的过曝窗户，右侧为浅色窗帘，温暖的自然背光在头发上营造出柔和的高光。采用真实的相机质感，具有浅景深、柔和的皮肤纹理、自然的比例、温馨的清晨氛围、简洁的构图，无文字，无水印，且没有其他人物。

descriptions.en: A photorealistic vertical portrait prompt for creating a cozy sunlit bedroom scene of an adult woman stretching with her face obscured.
descriptions.zh: 一个逼真的竖版肖像提示词，用于创作一个温馨的阳光卧室场景，画面中一位成年女性正在伸展身体，面部被遮挡。
